HLK Better-Breath Waterproof Nasal Strips assist athletes and fitness enthusiasts in improving breathing efficiency and recovery during and after exercise. OEM/ODM customization allows brands to adjust packaging, strip size, adhesive strength, and branding for personal or commercial use.

Inventory Planning for Standard and Premium Nasal Strips

Mar.24.2026

In the operation of nasal strip products, effective inventory planning is crucial. Different types of nasal strips target different consumer groups and usage scenarios, so inventory strategies should also be differentiated. This article shares a scientific approach to inventory management for standard and premium products, helping brands meet market demand while improving capital efficiency.

1. Inventory Planning for Standard Nasal Strips

Standard nasal strips are typically everyday-use products, affordable, and have stable sales. They appeal to a broad audience and have a high repurchase rate. Therefore, inventory strategies should focus on liquidity and supply assurance.

Key points for planning:

  • High turnover rate: Maintain sufficient stock for standard strips to handle daily order fluctuations and promotional activities.
  • Bulk purchasing: Prepare stock in advance based on historical sales and seasonal demand to reduce procurement costs.
  • Multi-channel distribution: Keep adequate inventory across e-commerce platforms, offline retail, and your own website to meet user demand at any time.
  • Safety stock: Reserve a certain amount as safety stock to prevent lost sales due to stockouts.

Recommended strategy: For standard nasal strips, use a "rolling replenishment + turnover optimization" model. Adjust restocking plans according to sales trends to maintain supply chain flexibility.

2. Inventory Planning for Premium Nasal Strips

Premium nasal strips are positioned as high-end, custom, gift sets, or special materials (e.g., satin, unique prints, or scented versions). Compared to standard strips, they have a smaller market, higher price points, and require more precise inventory management.

Key points for planning:

  • Production on demand: Premium strips often feature custom packaging or designs. Small-batch production based on orders helps reduce capital tie-up.
  • Limited stock: Maintain a small inventory of regular items to quickly respond to sudden orders or sample requests.
  • Sales forecasting: Consider holidays, promotions, and bulk customer orders to prepare inventory in advance.
  • Turnover risk control: High-priced, low-volume premium strips can have slow turnover. Be cautious with procurement to avoid overstocking.

Recommended strategy: Use an "order-based production + safety stock" model for premium strips to reduce inventory risk while ensuring user experience and supply stability.

3. Coordination Between Standard and Premium Inventory

  • Capital optimization: Allocate a larger proportion of inventory to standard strips while keeping premium inventory carefully controlled to maintain cash flow.
  • Marketing and promotions: Standard strips can support regular promotions and bundle sales, while premium strips can leverage holiday or gift-box campaigns.
  • Inventory data analysis: Regularly analyze weekly or monthly sales data to adjust the inventory ratio between standard and premium products.
  • Inventory alert system: Establish a warning mechanism to prevent stockouts of standard strips and overstock of premium strips.

4. Summary

Inventory planning is not static and should be dynamically adjusted according to product type, sales pace, and user demand.

  • Standard strips: Focus on sufficient supply, rapid turnover, and meeting daily orders and promotion needs.
  • Premium strips: Focus on precise management, production on demand, and reducing capital tie-up and inventory risk.

Proper inventory planning not only improves customer satisfaction but also optimizes capital utilization, laying a solid foundation for long-term brand growth.

Mouth Tape: A Growing Innovation in Sleep and Personal Care

Mar.16.2026

In recent years, mouth tape has emerged as a rapidly growing product in the global personal care and wellness market. Originally developed to encourage nasal breathing during sleep, mouth tape is now widely discussed in the fields of sleep health, respiratory wellness, and lifestyle optimization. As awareness of breathing habits and sleep quality continues to increase, mouth tape products are becoming an important tool for individuals seeking natural ways to improve their nighttime breathing patterns and overall rest.

Unlike traditional lip care products such as lip balms, lip masks, or lipsticks, mouth tape serves a functional purpose. It is designed to gently keep the mouth closed during sleep, encouraging the body to breathe through the nose. This shift toward nasal breathing can help reduce snoring, minimize dry mouth, and support healthier sleep habits.

Below is a comprehensive introduction to mouth tape, including its definition, functions, materials, applications, and future development potential.

What Is Mouth Tape?

Mouth tape is a small adhesive strip applied over the lips before sleep. It is typically made from breathable, skin-friendly materials that securely but gently hold the lips together throughout the night.

The purpose of mouth tape is to encourage nasal breathing instead of mouth breathing. Many people unknowingly breathe through their mouths while sleeping, which can contribute to snoring, dry mouth, poor sleep quality, and reduced oxygen efficiency.

Mouth tape products are usually designed with ergonomic shapes to comfortably fit around the lips. Common forms include:

  • Vertical strips

  • Oval-shaped patches

  • Cross or X-shaped designs

  • Full lip-cover patches

Most mouth tape products are single-use and disposable, although reusable designs may exist depending on the materials used.

Key Functions and Benefits of Mouth Tape

The increasing popularity of mouth tape is largely driven by its multiple health and lifestyle benefits.

1. Promoting Nasal Breathing

The primary function of mouth tape is to encourage nasal breathing during sleep. Nasal breathing provides several physiological advantages:

  • Filters dust and airborne particles

  • Warms and humidifies incoming air

  • Supports nitric oxide production, which helps oxygen circulation

  • Improves respiratory efficiency

By gently keeping the lips closed, mouth tape helps train the body to rely on the nose as the primary breathing pathway.

2. Reducing Snoring

Mouth breathing is a common contributor to snoring. When the mouth remains open during sleep, airflow patterns can cause vibration of soft tissues in the throat, resulting in snoring sounds.

Mouth tape helps keep the mouth closed, which can:

  • Stabilize airflow

  • Reduce throat vibration

  • Decrease snoring intensity in some individuals

Although mouth tape is not a medical treatment for severe sleep disorders, many users report noticeable improvements in snoring reduction.

3. Improving Sleep Quality

Better breathing patterns often lead to more stable sleep cycles. When breathing becomes smoother and more efficient, the body may experience:

  • fewer nighttime awakenings

  • improved oxygen delivery

  • deeper sleep stages

As a result, many users feel more refreshed and energized after using mouth tape consistently.

4. Preventing Dry Mouth

Sleeping with the mouth open can lead to significant moisture loss inside the mouth, often causing:

  • dry throat

  • bad breath

  • irritated gums

  • increased risk of dental problems

Mouth tape helps maintain a closed mouth position, preserving natural saliva moisture and improving oral comfort overnight.

Materials Commonly Used in Mouth Tape

To ensure comfort and safety, most mouth tape products use breathable, skin-friendly materials designed for prolonged contact with sensitive facial skin.

Common materials include:

Cotton Fabric

Cotton mouth tape offers excellent breathability and softness, making it suitable for users with sensitive skin.

Non-woven Fabric

Non-woven materials are lightweight and durable, providing good adhesion while maintaining comfort.

Rayon or Silk-like Fibers

These materials provide a smooth texture and flexible structure that adapts well to facial movement.

Hypoallergenic Adhesives

Medical-grade adhesives are commonly used to ensure:

  • secure attachment

  • easy removal

  • minimal skin irritation

High-quality products are usually latex-free and dermatologically tested to reduce the risk of allergic reactions.

Safety Considerations

While mouth tape is generally safe for healthy individuals, users should follow several precautions:

  • Avoid using mouth tape if you have nasal congestion or breathing difficulties

  • Do not use on irritated or damaged skin

  • Perform a skin sensitivity test before first use

  • Remove the tape gently to prevent skin irritation

Individuals with medical conditions such as severe sleep apnea should consult a healthcare professional before using mouth tape.

Market Trends and Growing Popularity

The global rise of mouth tape is closely linked to several lifestyle and wellness trends.

Increased Awareness of Sleep Health

Consumers are becoming more aware that sleep quality directly affects overall health, including immunity, productivity, and mental well-being. As a result, many people are exploring simple solutions to improve nighttime breathing.

Social Media Influence

Platforms like TikTok and Instagram have significantly boosted awareness of mouth tape. Fitness influencers, sleep experts, and wellness creators frequently share experiences and demonstrations of the product.

Fitness and Athletic Communities

Athletes and fitness enthusiasts often emphasize nasal breathing as part of performance optimization. This has further driven interest in mouth tape among individuals pursuing better breathing habits.

Growth of the Wellness Industry

The global wellness market continues to expand rapidly, and products related to sleep optimization, respiratory health, and recovery are experiencing strong demand.

Future Development Potential

The mouth tape industry is still evolving, and several areas may shape its future growth.

Advanced Materials

Manufacturers are exploring more breathable and skin-friendly materials to improve comfort during long periods of wear.

Smart Health Integration

Future designs may integrate biosensors or monitoring technologies that track breathing patterns and sleep quality.

Sustainable Products

Eco-friendly materials, biodegradable adhesives, and recyclable packaging are becoming increasingly important as consumers prioritize sustainability.

Global Market Expansion

While mouth tape is already popular in North America, Europe, and parts of Asia, demand is expected to grow in emerging markets across Africa, Latin America, and Southeast Asia.

Conclusion

Mouth tape represents a simple yet effective innovation within the sleep and wellness industry. By encouraging nasal breathing during sleep, it helps address common issues such as snoring, dry mouth, and inconsistent breathing patterns.

As awareness of sleep health continues to grow worldwide, mouth tape is likely to remain a key product in the personal wellness market. With ongoing improvements in materials, design, and technology, the product category has strong potential for future development.

For consumers seeking practical ways to improve sleep quality and breathing habits, mouth tape provides a convenient and accessible solution.

Wayne Wu

Common Challenges in Face Tape Applications: A Technical and After-Sales Perspective

Mar.20.2026

Adhesive Performance and Skin Interaction
Variability in Adhesion Across Conditions
One of the most critical performance factors in face tape is adhesive reliability. In real-world use, adhesion is influenced by multiple variables:

Skin type (oily, dry, combination)

Sebum production levels

Ambient humidity and temperature

Physical activity and perspiration

Inconsistent adhesion often results not from a single defect, but from the interaction between adhesive formulation and external conditions. High-performance face tapes typically utilize medical-grade pressure-sensitive adhesives engineered to maintain tack under dynamic skin movement while avoiding excessive bonding that complicates removal.

Dermatological Compatibility
Skin compatibility remains a primary concern, particularly for users with sensitive or reactive skin. Potential issues include:

Mild erythema (redness) after removal

Itching or localized discomfort

Rare allergic contact dermatitis

These reactions are often linked to adhesive chemistry, backing material breathability, or residual monomers from production. To mitigate risk, advanced products undergo dermatological and biocompatibility testing, but variability in individual skin response remains unavoidable.

Patch testing protocols and transparent ingredient disclosure are essential tools for reducing adverse reactions in end users.

Application Technique and User Variability
Placement Accuracy and Mechanical Effect
The effectiveness of face tape is highly dependent on correct placement relative to facial muscle orientation and skin tension lines. Improper application can lead to:

Ineffective lifting results

Visible distortion of skin

Premature detachment

Common user errors include applying tape to inadequately cleaned skin, overstretching during placement, or ignoring natural anatomical contours. These factors significantly reduce functional performance even when the product itself is properly manufactured.

Wear Duration and Removal Mechanics
Improper wear duration is another frequent source of complaints. Two primary misuse patterns emerge:

Overuse: Extended wear leading to adhesive residue buildup or skin stress

Premature removal: Reducing effectiveness and increasing perceived product failure

Removal technique is equally important. Abrupt or forceful removal can compromise skin barrier integrity, whereas controlled, low-angle peeling minimizes mechanical irritation.

Clear guidance on wear time (typically several hours rather than continuous use) and removal procedures is essential to maintaining both safety and user satisfaction.

Manufacturing Consistency and Product Reliability
Material Uniformity Challenges
Even minor deviations in production can affect face tape performance. Key variables include:

Adhesive coating weight consistency

Substrate thickness uniformity

Elastic recovery of backing materials

Inconsistencies may result in uneven adhesion, reduced comfort, or visible differences during application. High-precision coating and lamination technologies, combined with inline inspection systems, are required to maintain batch-to-batch consistency.

Packaging and Storage Stability
Face tape is sensitive to environmental exposure throughout its lifecycle. Improper storage conditions—such as elevated temperature, humidity, or UV exposure—can degrade:

Adhesive tack and cohesion

Material flexibility

Overall shelf-life stability

These degradation effects are often misinterpreted by customers as manufacturing defects. Proper packaging design (e.g., moisture barriers, UV-resistant materials) and clear storage instructions are critical to preserving product integrity.

Customer Experience and After-Sales Support
Expectation Misalignment
A significant portion of after-sales issues stems from unrealistic or unclear expectations. Face tape provides temporary mechanical lifting, not permanent structural change. Without proper education, users may:

Expect long-lasting or transformative results

Misinterpret normal product behavior as failure

Use the product outside its intended scope

Clear positioning, visual demonstrations, and realistic outcome communication are essential in reducing dissatisfaction.

Support Responsiveness and Technical Guidance
Due to the technique-sensitive nature of face tape, customer support must go beyond generic responses. Effective support systems include:

Application troubleshooting guides

Visual or video-based instructions

Rapid response protocols for user concerns

Well-trained support teams that understand both product mechanics and skin interaction dynamics can significantly improve resolution rates and customer retention.

Safety Considerations and Usage Boundaries
Frequency of Use and Skin Recovery
While face tape is designed for temporary cosmetic use, excessive frequency can lead to cumulative skin stress. Potential risks include:

Increased skin sensitivity

Disruption of the skin barrier

Temporary texture irregularities

Best practice involves intermittent use with sufficient recovery time between applications, allowing the skin to maintain its natural function.

Interaction with Skincare and Cosmetics
Compatibility with existing skincare routines is a common challenge. Certain products can interfere with adhesion or cause reactions, including:

Oil-based moisturizers reducing adhesive effectiveness

Active ingredients (e.g., acids, retinoids) increasing sensitivity

Makeup layers affecting bonding stability

Providing clear pre-application guidelines—such as applying tape on clean, oil-free skin—helps prevent performance issues and adverse reactions.

FAQ
What is the ideal wear time for face tape
Most face tape products are designed for short-term wear, typically within a few hours. Duration should be adjusted based on individual skin tolerance and product specifications.

How can users minimize skin irritation
Proper skin preparation, patch testing, and gentle removal techniques significantly reduce the risk of irritation. Avoid using on compromised or highly sensitive skin.

Why does adhesion vary between users
Differences in skin type, environmental exposure, and skincare routines all influence adhesive performance. Proper preparation is critical for consistent results.

Is face tape suitable for daily use
Frequent use is possible but should be moderated. Allowing recovery intervals between applications helps maintain skin health and long-term usability.

Wayne Wu
                  Sales 
                  Quanzhou Honglinkai New Material Co., Ltd.

MOUTH TAPE

HLK Customized Lip Shape Hypoallergenic Hydrogel Mouth Sleep Tape Soft Adhesive Breathing Stop Snoring Moisturizing Patches

Get a peaceful night's sleep with our innovative Lip Shape Hydrogel Mouth Sleep Tape. Specifically designed to promote nasal breathing and reduce snoring, this gentle adhesive patch keeps your mouth comfortably closed while you sleep. Made with premium hypoallergenic hydrogel material, the patch is soft on your skin and won't cause irritation or leave residue. The unique lip-shaped design provides optimal coverage while moisturizing your lips throughout the night. Perfect for those who struggle with mouth breathing, dry mouth, or snoring issues. Each patch is individually wrapped for hygiene and features an easy-peel design for convenient application. Experience better sleep quality and wake up feeling refreshed with this comfortable, skin-friendly solution. Available in convenient multi-night packs, these breathable patches are your path to quieter, more restful sleep.

Description
* Health benefits: an improved jawline, better oral health, better sleep
* Theaimwith mouth tape for sleep isn’t to block the oral airway so that you have no choice but to breathe through the nose.
Rather, taping ensures that your oral muscles relax and remind your respiratory system to use the nose,

HX Adhesive tape factory is located in Licheng District, Quanzhou (Capital of East Asian Culture), Fujian province.
4.Can I get some samples for testing before placing order?
Certainly,we can provide you free samples if you would like to accept the express cost.
5. How long does the lead time for small order or big order?
Small orders usually take 3-7 days, while large orders take about 8-15 days.
6. How to make sure the quality of products?
According to customer's request, we will send samples to ensure customer's satisfaction.In addition, when the customer confirms the order, we will keep in touch with the customer.Finally, after shipment, we will confirm the product information again so as to facilitate long-term cooperation in the future.

About Us

Home /  About Us

Who We Are

Established in 2012, Quanzhou Honglinkai New Material Co., Ltd. is a trusted manufacturer specializing in high-quality adhesive products, located in the culturally rich city of Quanzhou, East China. With over 20 years of expertise in the tape market, we have built a strong reputation for our innovative Mouth Tape and Nasal Strips, designed to meet the diverse needs of global customers. Our 5,000 m² manufacturing facility is equipped with advanced production machinery, including precision coating, rewinding, slitting, and packing systems, ensuring efficient and consistent product quality. Every item we produce is backed by international certifications, reflecting our commitment to excellence and safety. Beyond manufacturing, we take pride in our dedicated after-sales service team, which provides reliable support and technical assistance to ensure complete customer satisfaction. At Quanzhou Honglinkai, we combine cutting-edge technology, rigorous quality control, and a customer-centric approach to deliver innovative adhesive solutions that make a difference in people’s lives.

Voir plus

Nos catégories de produits

Découvrez des produits premium pour la bouche et le nez personnalisables répondant aux normes mondiales ; une production flexible améliore l'expérience client mondiale.

  • Ruban buccal
    Voir plus
  • Dilatateurs nasaux
    Voir plus

Conceptions sur mesure pour les marques de santé, du bien-être et du sport dans le monde - de la conception à la livraison

Certifié sous ISO13485, ISO9001, CE et TGA, HLK Tape dispose de plus de 20 ans d'expérience dans la fabrication de rubans adhésifs dans son usine automatisée de 5 000 m², offrant une solution complète en une seule étape, de l'idée à la livraison.

  • Avantage produit : Nos rubans pour la bouche et le nez utilisent un adhésif hypoallergénique de qualité médicale et des matériaux écologiques — et vous pouvez personnaliser la couleur, la forme, le goût et l'emballage pour un confort respiratoire et une adhérence durable.
  • Atout service : Nous acceptons des commandes minimales basses (à partir de 10 pièces), fournissons des échantillons gratuits (frais de port à votre charge), vous attribuons un gestionnaire de projet dédié et répondons aux demandes en deux jours en moyenne.
  • Avantage technologique : Des lignes entièrement automatisées pour le revêtement, le rebobinage, le découpage et l'emballage, couplées à un suivi en temps réel de l'épaisseur et de l'adhésivité, garantissent une cohérence pour chaque lot.
  • Avantage prix : Grâce à une production automatisée à grande échelle, notre ruban coûte seulement 0,03 $–0,06 $ par pièce tout en respectant une qualité de premier ordre et les certifications internationales.
Découvrez la solution sur mesure Honglinkai

CERTIFICATS

Années d
Expérience

À propos de nous

Qui sommes-nous

Quanzhou Honglinkai New Material Co. LTD a été fondée en 2012. L'entreprise est située dans la ville de Quanzhou, une ville culturelle en Asie de l'Est. Occupant une superficie de 5 000 m2. Nous nous concentrons sur le marché des bandes spéciales depuis plus de 20 ans. Spécialisés dans la production de Bandes buccales et dilatateurs nasaux, entre autres. Tous nos articles sont certifiés et disposent d'une équipe dédiée au service après-vente. Y compris une série de machines de production, d'application, de rembobinage, de découpe et d'emballage pour répondre à divers besoins.

En savoir plus
  • 1000

    Clients coopératifs

  • 2

    Temps de réponse moyen

  • 7

    Jours de production réguliers

  • 30

    Entreprises logistiques coopératives

Pourquoi s'associer avec nous ?

  • Expérience

    Avec des années d'expérience dans l'industrie, nous comprenons les besoins des différents marchés et proposons des recommandations de produits adaptées.



    Notre équipe allie expertise technique et connaissance approfondie du secteur pour offrir à nos clients un accompagnement et un soutien professionnels.

  • Service d'achat à guichet unique

    De la conception du produit jusqu'à la fabrication, notre équipe fournit un soutien complet pour rendre le processus facile pour nos clients.



    En améliorant la gestion de la chaîne d'approvisionnement, nous garantissons une expérience d'achat fluide. Que vous ayez besoin de petites commandes personnalisées ou de grosses commandes en gros, nous pouvons offrir des services adaptés à vos besoins.

  • Performance des coûts

    Nous mettons l'accent sur des prix compétitifs tout en maintenant une qualité élevée des produits.



    Grâce à une production efficace et à des économies d'échelle, nous livrons des produits de grande qualité à moindre coût, offrant ainsi la meilleure valeur ajoutée à nos clients.

  • Vitesse de production/livraison

    Notre production est efficace et flexible, ce qui nous permet de répondre rapidement aux besoins des clients.



    Nous assurons des livraisons ponctuelles, un suivi précis et une gestion solide de la chaîne d'approvisionnement afin de garantir des expéditions à temps pour les commandes urgentes.

  • Expérience
  • Service d'achat à guichet unique
  • Performance des coûts
  • Vitesse de production/livraison

Retour des clients

Amir bin Razak (Directeur des ventes régional pour l'Asie du Sud-Est)

Nous collaborons depuis 8 mois sur un OEM de patchs buccaux en Asie du Sud-Est. La technologie mature de l'usine garantit des patchs nasaux conformes et parfaitement ajustés, avec une personnalisation souple (échantillons disponibles en une semaine). Optimisez la communication interfuseaux horaires — étendez la fenêtre de réponse du contact dédié. Un partenaire fiable pour le long terme.

En savoir plus

Carlos Gómez (Directeur général stratégie marché Europe)

L'ODM de patchs buccaux à ingrédients naturels de l'usine pour l'Europe impressionne par son contrôle qualité rigoureux et ses itérations rapides d'emballage. Le délai pour les essais en petites séries est légèrement long ; son optimisation faciliterait l'expansion sur les marchés de niche. Nous avons confirmé des commandes sur 3 trimestres, et envisageons avec intérêt une collaboration plus approfondie.

En savoir plus

Lim Wei Jie (Responsable gestion opérations Asie-Pacifique)

Nous avons choisi cet atelier pour l'ODM de patchs nasaux en raison de sa chaîne d'approvisionnement transparente et de son taux de livraison à temps de 98 %. L'équipe technique a ajusté deux fois l'adhérence du patch buccal pour répondre aux exigences. Un contrôle des coûts plus souple renforcerait la compétitivité de la coopération.

En savoir plus

Olivier Dubois (Directeur du développement commercial mondial / Chef de région Europe)

En collaboration sur l'OEM de patchs nasaux haut de gamme, les matériaux respectueux de la peau, écologiques et au design à la française de l'atelier répondent aux normes européennes. Bien que les processus soient légèrement complexes, une optimisation de l'efficacité sans compromettre la qualité permettra d'élargir la coopération.

En savoir plus

Michael Peterson (Vice-président relations clients Amérique du Nord)

L'atelier excelle dans l'OEM/ODM de patchs buccaux et nasaux — personnalisation 30 % plus rapide, qualité stable et chaînes d'approvisionnement fiables. Renforcer la communication préalable sur la conformité nord-américaine permettrait de réduire les coûts ultérieurs ; un partenaire de premier plan pour l'expansion sur le marché nord-américain.

En savoir plus
Pouvons-nous passer une petite commande ?

Bien sûr, nous pouvons accepter des petites commandes, mais il y aura une demande de QCM si cela concerne la conception de logo ou l'impression.

Où est situé votre usine ?

L'usine de ruban HLK est située dans le district de Licheng, à Quanzhou (Capitale de la Culture de l'Est Asiatique), province du Fujian.

Combien de temps dure le délai de livraison pour une petite commande ou une grande commande ?

Les petites commandes prennent généralement 3 à 7 jours, tandis que les grandes commandes nécessitent environ 8 à 15 jours.

Pouvez-vous fabriquer d'autres tailles et emballages pour ce produit ?

Oui, nous pouvons répondre à une demande concernant l'emballage et la taille. Veuillez nous envoyer un message de demande avec tous les détails pertinents, et nous le confirmerons avant de vous faire une offre.

Puis-je obtenir des échantillons pour tester avant de passer commande ?

Certainement, nous pouvons vous fournir des échantillons gratuits si vous acceptez de prendre en charge les frais d'envoi.

Comment garantir la qualité des produits ?

Conformément à la demande du client, nous enverrons des échantillons pour assurer la satisfaction du client. De plus, lorsque le client confirme la commande, nous resterons en contact avec lui. Enfin, après l'expédition, nous vérifierons à nouveau les informations sur le produit afin de faciliter une coopération à long terme à l'avenir.

Veuillez ajouter notre WhatsApp pour partager vos besoins. Nous sélectionnerons des styles correspondants ou choisirons des articles prêts à l'emploi de manière aléatoire, et les enverrons avec l'emballage. Les échantillons sont gratuits - vous n'avez qu'à payer les frais de port (20 $ à 35 $). Cliquez pour ajouter WhatsApp

استكشف منتجات الفم والأنف المميزة القابلة للتخصيص والتي تلبي المعايير العالمية؛ يعزز الإنتاج المرنة تجربة العملاء العالمية.

  • شريط الفم
    عرض المزيد
  • الشريحة الأنفية
    عرض المزيد

تصاميم مخصصة لعلامات صحية، رفاهية ورياضية عالمية - من الفكرة حتى التسليم

معتمدة وفقًا لمعايير ISO13485، ISO9001، CE و TGA، تمتلك HLK Tape أكثر من 20 عامًا من الخبرة في تصنيع الأشرطة اللاصقة في مصنعها الآلي الذي يمتد على مساحة 5,000 م²، وتقدم حلًا شاملًا ومتكاملًا من الفكرة حتى التسليم.

  • مميزات المنتج: أشرطة الفم والأنف لدينا تستخدم مواد لاصقة طبية خالية من الحساسية ومواد صديقة للبيئة - ويمكنك تخصيص اللون، الشكل، النكهة والتغليف لتحقيق الراحة القابلة للتنفس واللزوجة طويلة الأمد.
  • ميزة الخدمة: نقبل أوامر الحد الأدنى المنخفض (حتى 10 قطع)، ونقدم عينات مجانية (تتحمل تكاليف الشحن)، ونخصص لك مدير مشروع مكرس، ونرد على الاستفسارات خلال يومين في المتوسط.
  • الميزة التقنية: خطوط الطلاء، إعادة намش الأشرطة، القطع والتغليف بالكامل آلية، مع مراقبة فورية لسمك المادة ولزوجتها لضمان استمرارية كل دفعة.
  • مزايا السعر: بفضل الإنتاج الكبير والمُتَحَكَّم فيه آليًا، يصل سعر شريطنا إلى 0.03-0.06 دولار أمريكي لكل قطعة مع المحافظة على الجودة العالية والشهادات الدولية.

سنوات من
الخبرة

من نحن

من نحن

تأسست شركة Quanzhou Honglinkai New Material Co. LTD في عام 2012. تقع الشركة في مدينة قوانغتشو، وهي مدينة ثقافية في شرق آسيا. تغطي مساحة قدرها 5,000 م2. ركزنا على سوق الأشرطة الخاصة لأكثر من 20 عامًا. متخصصون في إنتاج أشرطة الفم وشريط الأنف وما إلى ذلك. جميع منتجاتنا تحمل شهادات ولدينا فريق خاص لخدمة ما بعد البيع. تشمل خطوط الإنتاج مجموعة من الآلات مثل آلات الإنتاج، الطلاء، إعادة لف الشريط، القص، والتغليف لتلبية مختلف الاحتياجات.

معرفة المزيد
  • 1000

    العملاء الشركاء

  • 2

    متوسط ​​وقت الاستجابة

  • 7

    أيام الإنتاج العادية

  • 30

    شركات اللوجستيات التعاونية

لماذا تتعاون معنا؟

  • الخبرة

    وبفضل خبرتنا الصناعية التي تمتد لسنوات، فإننا نفهم احتياجات الأسواق المختلفة ونقدم توصيات منتجات مخصصة.



    يجمع فريقنا بين الخبرة التقنية والمعرفة العميقة بالصناعة لتوفير إرشادات ودعم احترافي للعملاء.

  • خدمة الشراء الشاملة

    من اقتراحات تصميم المنتجات وحتى التصنيع، فريقنا يقدم دعماً كاملاً لجعل العملية سهلة بالنسبة لعملائنا.



    من خلال تحسين إدارة سلسلة التوريد، نضمن تجربة شراء سلسة. سواء كنت بحاجة إلى طلبات مخصصة صغيرة أو طلبات جملة كبيرة، يمكننا توفير خدمات تتناسب مع احتياجاتك.

  • أداء التكلفة

    نحن نركز على تقديم أسعار تنافسية مع الحفاظ على جودة عالية للمنتجات.



    بفضل الإنتاج الفعال والاقتصادات في الحجم، نقوم بتوصيل منتجات عالية الجودة بتكاليف أقل، مما يمنح عملائنا أفضل قيمة مقابل أموالهم.

  • سرعة الإنتاج/التوصيل

    إنتاجنا فعال ومرن، مما يسمح لنا ب đáp سريع على احتياجات العملاء.



    نحن نضمن التسليم في الوقت المحدد وتتبع الدقيق وإدارة قوية لسلسلة التوريد لضمان الشحنات في الوقت المحدد للطلبات العاجلة.

  • الخبرة
  • خدمة الشراء الشاملة
  • أداء التكلفة
  • سرعة الإنتاج/التوصيل

تعليقات العملاء

أمير بن رزاق (مدير المبيعات الإقليمي لجنوب شرق آسيا)

لقد تعاونّا مع مصنع منتجات العناية بالفم في جنوب شرق آسيا للتصنيع التعاوني لأكثر من 8 أشهر. تضمن التكنولوجيا الناضجة للمصنع منتجات تغطية الأنف المتوافقة مع المواصفات وعالية الدقة، مع إمكانية التخصيص المرنة (توفير عينات خلال أسبوع). نوصي بتحسين التواصل عبر المناطق الزمنية المختلفة من خلال توسيع فترة استجابة جهة الاتصال المخصصة. شريك موثوق به على المدى الطويل.

اقرأ المزيد

كارلوس غوميز (المدير العام لاستراتيجية السوق الأوروبي)

تُبهرنا منتجات المصنع الخاصة بتغطية الفم حسب التصميم الأصلي (ODM) لأوروبا بمكوناتها الطبيعية، وبما تتمتع به من ضبط صارم للجودة وتكرارات سريعة في التعبئة والتغليف. ومع ذلك، فإن مدة تنفيذ الطلبات التجريبية الصغيرة أطول قليلاً؛ ولذلك فإن تحسين هذه المدة سيساعد في التوسع نحو الأسواق المتخصصة. وقد أكدنا طلبات لثلاثة أرباع متتالية، ونتطلع إلى تعزيز التعاون بشكل أعمق.

اقرأ المزيد

ليم وي جي (مدير إدارة العمليات في منطقة آسيا والمحيط الهادئ)

اخترنا هذه المصنع لتصنيع قطع الأنف حسب الطلب (ODM) نظرًا لسلاسل التوريد الشفافة وتوصيله في الوقت المحدد بنسبة 98%. قام الفريق الفني بتعديل التصاق قطعة الفم مرتين لتلبية المتطلبات. وقد يعزز التحكم الأكثر مرونة في التكاليف من قدرة التعاون على المنافسة.

اقرأ المزيد

أوليفييه دوبوا (مدير تطوير الأعمال العالمي / رئيس منطقة أوروبا)

بالتعاون في تصنيع قطع الأنف عالية الجودة حسب الطلب (OEM)، فإن المواد الصديقة للبشرة والصديقة للبيئة والتصميم على الطراز الفرنسي التي يستخدمها المصنع تلبي المعايير الأوروبية. وعلى الرغم من أن العمليات معقدة بعض الشيء، فإن تحسين الكفاءة دون المساس بالجودة سيمكننا من توسيع نطاق التعاون.

اقرأ المزيد

مايكل بيترسون (نائب رئيس علاقات العملاء لأمريكا الشمالية)

يتفوق هذا المصنع في تصنيع قطع الفم/الأنف حسب الطلب (OEM/ODM) — حيث يتم التخصيص أسرع بنسبة 30%، وجودة مستقرة وسلاسل توريد موثوقة. وزيادة التواصل المسبق بشأن الامتثال لأمريكا الشمالية ستخفض التكاليف اللاحقة؛ وهو شريك رئيسي للتوسع في السوق بأمريكا الشمالية.

اقرأ المزيد
هل يمكننا تقديم طلب صغير؟

بالتأكيد، يمكننا قبول الطلبات الصغيرة، ولكن سيكون هناك حد أدنى لكمية الطلب إذا كان يتعلق بتصميم الشعار أو الطباعة.

ما هو موقع مصنعكم؟

مصنع شريط HLK يقع في منطقة ليتشنغ، قوانغتشو (عاصمة الثقافة الشرق آسيوية)، إقليم فوجيان.

ما هي فترة الإنتظار للطلبات الصغيرة أو الكبيرة؟

عادةً تستغرق الطلبات الصغيرة من 3 إلى 7 أيام، بينما تستغرق الطلبات الكبيرة حوالي 8 إلى 15 يومًا.

هل يمكنك إنتاج أحجام وتعبئات أخرى لهذا المنتج؟

نعم، يمكننا تنفيذ الطلب حسب التفاصيل المطلوبة للحجم والتعبئة، يرجى إرسال رسالة استفسار إلينا بالتفاصيل ذات الصلة، وسنؤكد ذلك قبل تقديم العرض السعري لك.

هل يمكنني الحصول على عينات للاختبار قبل تقديم الطلب؟

بالطبع، يمكننا توفير عينات مجانية لك إذا كنت تقبل تحمل تكلفة الشحن.

كيف يمكن التأكد من جودة المنتجات؟

وفقًا لطلب العميل، سنقوم بإرسال عينات لضمان رضا العميل. بالإضافة إلى ذلك، عندما يؤكد العميل الطلب، سنبقى على تواصل معه. وأخيرًا، بعد الشحن، سنؤكد مجددًا معلومات المنتج لتيسير التعاون طويل الأمد في المستقبل.

يرجى إضافة واتسابنا لمشاركة احتياجاتك. سنقوم باختيار الأنماط المناسبة أو اختيار ones جاهزة عشوائيًا، وإرسالها مع التغليف. العينات مجانية - عليك فقط دفع تكلفة الشحن (20-35 دولارًا). انقر لإضافة واتساب

NASAL STRIPS

Comfort Fit Nasal Strips for Congestion & Snoring – Hypoallergenic, Latex-Free, Sweatproof, Extra Strength HLK

Introduction

Product General Information

Place of Origin: Fujian, China
Brand Name: HLK
Model Number: HLK-NP
Certification: CE, ROHS
Minimum Order Quantity: 30 pieces
Price: Get a quote quickly + Free Sample Offer
Packaging Details: 15×10×0.01cm (per unit); 0.004kg (gross weight); 30pcs per set
Delivery Time: 12-20Days
Payment Terms: T/T, L/C, PayPal,
Supply Ability: 1,000,000 pieces per month

   

Quick Detail:
● Different names for the product: Sleep Better Nasal Strips, Clear Breathing Nasal Strips, Open Nose Strips
● Main applications: Alleviate sinus pressure,Improve overall sleep quality,Minimize sleep apnea symptoms
● Core specifications: 66×19 mm (large size adult fit), non‑woven/PE + flexible internal support “spring‑like” structure, disposable single-use design.

   
Description:
HLK Better-Breath Waterproof Nasal Strips are designed to improve nasal airflow through gentle mechanical dilation using a dual spring-frame system. The medical-grade, hypoallergenic adhesive allows for irritation-free use, ensuring comfort even during long hours of wear. The waterproof and sweat-resistant construction keeps the strips securely in place during sports, exercise, outdoor activities, or overnight sleep. These drug-free nasal strips help reduce snoring, encourage nasal breathing, and relieve congestion caused by allergies, sinus pressure, or colds. The large 66×19 mm design fits adults with higher or wider nasal bridges comfortably, while OEM/ODM options allow customization of packaging, adhesive strength, materials, and branding for private-label or commercial use.

   
Applications:
● Breathing regulation for long-distance cycling
● Breathing support for HIIT workouts
● Increase lung capacity during hiking or mountain climbing
● Strengthening respiratory muscles in fitness training

   
Specifications

Product Name HLK Anti Snoring Patch
Model Number HLK-NP
Material Non‑woven/PE
Quantity per Set 30 pieces
Shelf Life 1 year
Place of Origin Fujian, China
Certification CE, RECH
Packaging Size 15×10×0.01cm
Gross Weight (per unit) 0.004kg

  
Competitive Advantage:
● A professional engineering team helps optimize product structure and functionality.
● One-stop sourcing reduces the need to coordinate with multiple suppliers.
● In-house QC plus third-party testing ensure authoritative quality assurance.

PRODUCTS

HLK Premium Material Beauty Precut Anti Wrinkle Private Label Kinesiology Double Chin Lifting Lift Face Tape for Wrinkles Face

Transform your facial appearance instantly with HLK's premium face lifting tape, specifically designed for double chin reduction and wrinkle smoothing. Made from high-grade medical-grade materials, these precut kinesiology tapes are gentle on sensitive skin while providing effective lifting and support. The innovative adhesive ensures a secure hold that remains comfortable throughout wear, making it perfect for special events or daily use. Each piece is precisely cut for easy application and features our specialized V-shape design that targets sagging areas around the jawline and neck. The transparent, skin-friendly tape is virtually invisible once applied, allowing you to achieve a more youthful, contoured appearance discreetly. Our private label collection comes in convenient packaging with detailed application instructions. Experience professional-grade facial contouring results without invasive procedures - ideal for beauty salons, spas, and personal use.

1. Can we make a small order?
For sure, we can accept small orders, but there would be a MOQ request if it is logo design or
printing.
2. Can you make other sizes and packages for this product?
Yes, we could finish as a request for package and size, all relevant details please kindly send an inquiry message to us, and we would confirm it before quotation for you.
3. What is your factory location?
HX Adhesive tape factory is located in Licheng District, Quanzhou (Capital of East Asian Culture), Fujian province.
4.Can I get some samples for testing before placing order?
Certainly,we can provide you free samples if you would like to accept the express cost.
5. How long does the lead time for small order or big order?
Small orders usually take 3-7 days, while large orders take about 8-15 days.
6. How to make sure the quality of products?
According to customer's request, we will send samples to ensure customer's satisfaction.In addition, when the customer confirms the order, we will keep in touch with the customer.Finally, after shipment, we will confirm the product information again so as to facilitate long-term cooperation in the future.

News

Home /  News

How to Choose the Right Mouth Tape Supplier for Your Business

Mar.31.2026

1. Qualifications & Compliance: The Non-Negotiable Foundation

Mouth tape falls under medical device categories or skin-contact hygiene products, with varying regulatory requirements across different countries and regions.

1. Medical Device Certifications

  • If positioning your product as a "medical device" or "therapeutic aid for mouth breathing," the supplier must hold relevant manufacturing qualifications.

  • China Market: Look for Medical Device Registration Certificate and Manufacturing License.

  • US/EU Markets: Verify whether the supplier can provide FDA (US) or CE (EU) certifications, or cooperate in obtaining them.

2. Cosmetic / General Product Compliance

  • Even if sold as a "sleep aid" or "beauty accessory," the product must still comply with local safety standards for cosmetics or general consumer goods.

  • Request MSDS (Material Safety Data Sheet), skin irritation test reports, and heavy metal & microbial testing reports.

3. Production Environment Audit

  • Prioritize suppliers certified under ISO 13485 (Medical Devices Quality Management) or ISO 9001.

  • Conduct factory visits or request documentation on cleanroom classification to ensure the production environment meets hygiene requirements.

2. Materials & Safety: The Cornerstone of User Trust

Mouth tape is applied directly to the lip area, making material selection critical. Poor-quality adhesives or non-breathable backing materials can lead to allergies, skin damage, or even breathing discomfort.

Key Evaluation Criteria:

Evaluation Aspect Core Requirements
Adhesive Medical-grade pressure-sensitive adhesive, hypoallergenic, painless removal with no residue
Backing Material Highly breathable (e.g., non-woven fabric, medical breathable film) to prevent stuffiness
Structural Design Ergonomic shape that does not obstruct nasal breathing; stays in place overnight
Non-Irritating Latex-free, fluorescent agent-free, no irritating odor

Recommendation: Request samples for internal testing before mass production, including:

  • Real-user trials (different skin types, sleep positions)

  • Removal experience testing

  • 8-hour overnight adhesion testing

3. Manufacturing Process & Quality Control: Ensuring Consistency

Mouth tape is a high-repeat-purchase, high-sensitivity product where batch-to-batch consistency and stability are essential.

1. Production Capacity

  • Confirm the supplier's daily/monthly output and whether they can meet your peak order demands.

  • Evaluate automation levels: automated die-cutting, adhesive coating, and packaging equipment significantly reduce contamination risks.

2. Quality Control System

  • Request documentation of IQC (Incoming Quality Control), IPQC (In-Process Quality Control), and OQC (Outgoing Quality Control) procedures.

  • Confirm whether the supplier maintains retained samples for batch traceability.

3. Customization Capabilities

  • Do they support custom shapes (H-shape, X-shape, oval), sizes, colors, and packaging?

  • Do they have printing/stamping capabilities (similar to printed nose strips, mouth tape also offers opportunities for brand logo exposure)?

4. R&D & Innovation: Key to Differentiation

In a highly commoditized market, a supplier's R&D capabilities determine how far your brand can go.

Innovation Directions Worth Exploring:

  • Material Upgrades: Bio-based materials, biodegradable backings—aligning with sustainability trends

  • Functional Combinations: Infused with natural essential oils (lavender for sleep), moisturizing ingredients, etc.

  • Segment Targeting: Pediatric sizes, sensitive-skin versions

  • Packaging Innovation: Individually sealed units, portable packs, resealable pouches

Partnering with suppliers who have in-house R&D capabilities allows you to build exclusive product advantages and avoid competing solely on price.

5. Supply Chain Stability & Delivery Capability

While mouth tape is small in unit size, peak seasons (such as Singles' Day, Black Friday, etc.) can bring sudden surges in orders. A supplier's raw material lead times, production scheduling, and logistics capabilities directly impact your inventory turnover.

Key Questions to Ask:

  • Do they have stable upstream sources for raw materials (adhesive tape, backing materials)? Is there any single-source risk?

  • Does their MOQ (Minimum Order Quantity) align with your business stage?

  • What is their typical lead time? Can they accommodate rush orders?

  • Do they support split shipments or dropshipping models?

6. Communication & Service: The Intangible Yet Critical Factor

In B2B partnerships, a supplier's responsiveness, communication efficiency, and problem-solving ability often determine the longevity of the relationship.

  • Sample Turnaround: How long does it take from inquiry to receiving samples?

  • After-Sales Policy: How are quality issues handled? Is there a clear return or replacement mechanism?

  • Flexibility: Are they willing to accommodate third-party factory audits or inspections? Do they support small trial orders?

Before committing to a long-term partnership, consider placing a trial order (small batch) to evaluate the supplier's actual performance and collaboration capabilities.

Conclusion: Choosing the Right Supplier Means Choosing the Right Path

Though small in size, mouth tape carries significant weight in terms of user safety and experience. For businesses, selecting a supplier should go beyond price comparisons—it requires a comprehensive evaluation of compliance qualifications, material safety, manufacturing stability, innovation capabilities, and service quality.

A high-quality supplier is more than just a manufacturer; they are a strategic partner in your brand's growth. In this niche category, those who prioritize quality at the source will earn the long-term trust of their customers.

News

Home /  News

Nasal Strip Material Guide: Non-Woven Fabric, PE & Satin

Mar.23.2026

Choosing the right material is key when it comes to nasal strips. The material determines comfort, adhesion, and breathability. Here’s a simple guide to the three most common nasal strip materials: non-woven fabric, PE, and satin.

Non-Woven Fabric – Soft & Comfortable

Non-woven fabric nasal strips are thin, lightweight, and extremely soft. Once applied, they feel almost invisible on the nose. Their breathable structure allows air to circulate freely, making them perfect for overnight use. With medical-grade adhesive, they stick gently without irritating your skin.

✅ Best for: Daily wear, sleep support, light activities.
⚠️ Note: Sweat or oil may reduce adhesion; not ideal for intense workouts.

PE – Sport & Performance Focused

PE nasal strips are made from flexible plastic film with a smooth surface and micro-perforations for some breathability. They are water- and sweat-resistant, offering strong adhesion to keep your nasal passages open during exercise. The smooth surface is also perfect for custom logos or designs.

✅ Best for: Athletes, short-term use, or anyone seeking visible performance improvement.
⚠️ Note: Less comfortable for long wear, slightly firmer feel; breathability is lower than non-woven fabric.

Satin – Premium Comfort & Style

Satin nasal strips feature a silky smooth surface and soft texture, providing a luxurious, comfortable experience. They look elegant and are ideal for gift sets or premium designs. Gentle on sensitive skin, they can be worn for long periods without discomfort.

✅ Best for: High-end customization, sleep support, or anyone seeking both comfort and style.
⚠️ Note: Higher cost; smooth surface requires special adhesive for secure sticking.

Summary

  • Looking for comfort, breathability, and long wear? Go for non-woven fabric.
  • Need strong adhesion and performance during exercise? PE is your best choice.
  • Want a premium feel and stylish look? Satin is perfect.

Understanding the differences in materials helps you pick the right nasal strip for your needs, ensuring better breathing and a more comfortable experience.

Privacy Policy

Update Time: 2025/4/1

Effective Time:2030/4/1

We intend to make service better for everyone at our website, we collect and use information about you, our

  • customers who shop at our website
  • visitors to our websites, or anyone contacting us

This Privacy Policy will help you better understand how we collect, use, and share your personal information. If we change our privacy practices, we may update this privacy policy. If any changes are significant, we will let you know.

Our basic principles

  • Your information belongs to you

We carefully analyze what types of information we need to provide our services, and we try to limit the information we collect to only what we really need. Where possible, we delete or anonymize this information when we no longer need it. When building and improving our products, our engineers work closely with our privacy and security teams to build with privacy in mind. In all of this work our guiding principle is that your information belongs to you, and we aim to only use your information to your benefit.

  • We protect your information from others

If a third party requests your personal information, we will refuse to share it unless you give us permission or we are legally required. When we are legally required to share your personal information, we will tell you in advance, unless we are legally forbidden.

  • We will respond to privacy-related questions we receive.

What information we collect about you and why

We collect personal information when you sign up for our website, when you use our platform, or when you otherwise provide us information. We may also use third party service providers to help us to provide other service to you. In general, we need this information for you to be able to use our platform.

  • To provide you with the use of our platform and other related services (e.g., to confirm your identity, to contact you about issues with the platform), or to comply with legal requirements, or to prevent fraudulent use of our services, you provide us about you and your business, such as your name, business type, province and city, full address, business license, social credit code, taxpayer identification number, legal representative name.

Why we process your information

We generally process your information when we need to do so to fulfill a contractual obligation, or where we or someone we work with needs to use your personal information for a reason related to their business (for example, to provide you with a service), including:

  • make enquiries and trades
  • preventing risk and fraud
  • answering questions or providing other types of support
  • providing and improving our products and services
  • providing reporting and analytics
  • testing out features or additional services
  • assisting with marketing, advertising, or other communications

We only process personal information for above-mentioned situations after considering the potential risks to your privacy—for example, by providing clear transparency into our privacy practices, offering you control over your personal information where appropriate, limiting the information we keep, limiting what we do with your information, who we send your information to, how long we keep your information, or the technical measures we use to protect your information. In general, we will keep your information for 1 years.

We may process your personal information where you have provided your consent. In particular, where we cannot rely on an alternative legal basis for processing, where your data is sourced and it already comes with consent or where we are required by law to ask for your consent in the context of some of our sales and marketing activities. At any time, you have a right to withdraw your consent by changing your communication choices, opting out from our communications or by contacting us.

Your rights over your information

We believe you should be able to access and control your personal information no matter where you live. Depending on how you use our website, you may have the right to request access to, correct, amend, delete, port to another service provider, restrict, or object to certain uses of your personal information (for example, direct marketing). We will not charge you more or provide you with a different level of service if you exercise any of these rights.

Please note that if you send us a request relating to your personal information, we have to make sure that it is you before we can respond. In order to do so, we may use a third party to collect and verify identification documents.

If you are not happy with our response to a request, you can contact us to resolve the issue. You also have the right to contact your local data protection or privacy authority at any time.

Where we send your information

We are a Chinese company to operate our business, we may send your personal information outside of your state, province, or country, including transmission to servers deployed by our service providers in China or Singapore. This data may be subject to the laws of the countries where we send it. When we send your information across borders, we take steps to protect your information, and we try to only send your information to countries that have strong data protection laws.

While we do what we can to protect your information, we may at times be legally required to disclose your personal information (for example, if we receive a valid court order).

When and why we share your information with others

We use service providers to help us provide services to you. These services will be expressly provided to you based on your confirmation or consent. 

Outside of these service providers, we will only share your information if we are legally required to do so (for example, if we receive a legally binding court order or subpoena).

If you have questions about how we share your personal information, you should contact us.

How we protect your information

Our teams work tirelessly to protect your information, and to ensure the security and integrity of our platform. We also have independent auditors assess the security of our data storage and systems that process financial information. However, we all know that no method of transmission over the Internet, and method of electronic storage, can be 100% secure. This means we cannot guarantee the absolute security of your personal information.

You can find more information about our security measures at our website.

How we use “cookies” and other tracking technologies

We use cookies and similar tracking technologies on our website and when providing our services. For more information about how we use these technologies, including a list of other companies that place cookies on our sites, and an explanation of how you can opt out of certain types of cookies, please see our Cookie Policy.

How you can reach us

If you would like to ask about, make a request relating to, or complain about how we process your personal information, please contact us, or email us at the address below.

The 66×19 mm large size accommodates most adult nose shapes, especially those with high or broad nasal bridges. A nasal strip manufacturer specializes in developing and producing innovative breathing aids that enhance respiratory comfort through advanced adhesive technology and ergonomic design. These manufacturers employ state-of-the-art production facilities equipped with precision machinery to create medical-grade nasal strips that effectively lift nasal passages. The manufacturing process involves multiple quality control checkpoints, ensuring each strip meets stringent safety and performance standards. The facilities utilize automated systems for consistent production, maintaining precise specifications for strip flexibility, adhesive strength, and hypoallergenic properties. These manufacturers typically integrate research and development departments that continuously work on improving strip designs, adhesive formulations, and breathing effectiveness. Their production lines incorporate clean room technology to maintain sterile manufacturing conditions, while automated packaging systems ensure product integrity. Modern nasal strip manufacturers also implement sustainable practices, using eco-friendly materials and minimizing waste in their production processes. They maintain compliance with international medical device manufacturing standards and often hold multiple certifications for quality management systems. The manufacturing facilities are designed to accommodate high-volume production while maintaining the flexibility to create customized solutions for different market segments.

sleep mouthtape

Sleep mouthtape is an innovative solution designed to promote optimal breathing patterns during sleep by gently keeping the mouth closed, encouraging natural nasal breathing. This specialized adhesive tape is engineered with breathable, skin-friendly materials that ensure comfort while maintaining a secure seal throughout the night. The tape features a unique butterfly design that adapts to facial movements, allowing for natural jaw motion while maintaining gentle closure of the lips. Each strip is precisely crafted with medical-grade adhesive that's strong enough to stay in place yet gentle enough to remove without discomfort. The product includes specialized micro-pores that allow for minimal moisture buildup while maintaining effectiveness. The sleep mouthtape comes in various sizes to accommodate different facial structures and includes easy-to-follow application markers for proper placement. This solution is particularly beneficial for individuals who experience mouth breathing during sleep, which can lead to various health issues including dry mouth, poor sleep quality, and potential dental problems. The technology behind sleep mouthtape has been developed through extensive research in sleep science and respiratory health, making it a reliable tool for improving sleep quality and overall well-being.

New Product Recommendations

VIEW DETAILS

HLK Magnetic Nose Strip Breathe Boost Oxygen Reduce Snoring Improve Sleep Quality Sweat Resistant Magnetic Nasal Strips

VIEW DETAILS

HLK Customized Lip Shape Hypoallergenic Hydrogel Mouth Sleep Tape Soft Adhesive Breathing Stop Snoring Moisturizing Patches

VIEW DETAILS

HLK New Infused 6 Ingredients Vitamin Aloe COQ10 Silicone Mouth Tape With Collagen

VIEW DETAILS

HLK Premium Material Beauty Precut Anti Wrinkle Private Label Kinesiology Double Chin Lifting Lift Face Tape for Wrinkles Face

Sleep mouthtape offers numerous practical benefits that directly impact sleep quality and overall health. First and foremost, it effectively promotes nasal breathing, which naturally filters, humidifies, and warms the air before it reaches your lungs. This improved breathing pattern leads to better oxygen absorption and reduced snoring, resulting in more restful sleep. The gentle encouragement of nasal breathing helps maintain proper moisture levels in the mouth, reducing morning dry mouth and throat irritation. Users often report improved energy levels throughout the day due to better sleep quality. The tape's design considers user comfort with its hypoallergenic adhesive, which prevents skin irritation while maintaining effectiveness throughout the night. Its easy application and removal process makes it a practical addition to any bedtime routine. Regular use can help retrain breathing patterns, potentially leading to long-term improvements in sleep quality. The product's durability ensures it stays in place throughout the night, while its breathable material prevents any feeling of restriction or discomfort. For those concerned about dental health, the mouthtape helps reduce the risks associated with mouth breathing, including dental decay and bad breath. Athletes and fitness enthusiasts particularly benefit from improved nighttime breathing patterns, which can enhance recovery and performance. The cost-effectiveness of sleep mouthtape makes it an accessible solution for anyone looking to improve their sleep quality without significant investment in expensive equipment or treatments.

sleep mouthtape

mouth tape for sleep
mouth tape for sleep apnea

anti snoring mouth tape

Advanced Breathing Technology

The sleep mouthtape incorporates cutting-edge breathing technology that revolutionizes nighttime respiratory patterns. Its specialized micro-ventilation system allows for emergency mouth breathing when necessary while maintaining gentle lip closure. The tape's unique matrix structure creates an optimal balance between secure closure and comfort, utilizing advanced adhesive technology that responds to skin movement and moisture levels. This technological innovation ensures that users experience the benefits of nasal breathing without feeling restricted or uncomfortable. The carefully calculated tensile strength provides just enough pressure to keep the lips together naturally, while the breathable material prevents any sensation of claustrophobia or constraint. This advanced design represents years of research in sleep science and respiratory health, resulting in a product that effectively promotes healthy breathing patterns without compromising comfort or safety.

Comfort-Focused Design

The sleep mouthtape features a revolutionary comfort-focused design that prioritizes user experience without sacrificing effectiveness. The butterfly-shaped design contours perfectly to facial features, distributing pressure evenly across the lips while allowing for natural movement. The hypoallergenic adhesive is specifically formulated to be gentle on sensitive skin, preventing irritation or adverse reactions during overnight use. The tape's edges are carefully rounded to prevent catching or lifting during sleep, ensuring consistent performance throughout the night. The material thickness is precisely calibrated to provide the perfect balance between durability and flexibility, adapting to facial movements while maintaining its primary function. This thoughtful design approach extends to the tape's width and length, which are optimized for various face shapes and sizes, ensuring universal comfort and effectiveness.

Health-Optimizing Benefits

The health benefits of sleep mouthtape extend far beyond simple mouth closure during sleep. By promoting nasal breathing, it helps activate the body's natural nitric oxide production, which plays a crucial role in immune function and cardiovascular health. The consistent maintenance of nasal breathing throughout the night helps stabilize blood oxygen levels, contributing to better sleep quality and reduced instances of sleep disruption. Regular use can help strengthen the muscles involved in proper breathing patterns, potentially reducing sleep-related breathing difficulties over time. The product's role in maintaining optimal mouth moisture levels helps protect dental health by reducing the risk of cavity-causing bacteria growth overnight. Additionally, the improved breathing patterns facilitated by the tape can help reduce instances of sleep apnea symptoms and chronic snoring, leading to better overall sleep quality and daytime alertness.

tira nasal

The tira nasal is an innovative nasal strip designed to improve breathing and enhance sleep quality by gently opening the nasal passages. This medical-grade adhesive strip applies a gentle lifting action to the sides of the nose, effectively increasing the space in nasal passages by up to 30%. Using advanced elastic tension technology, the tira nasal works by physically lifting and opening the soft tissue above the nasal valve, the narrowest part of the nasal airway. The strip's unique design incorporates flexible spring-like bands that, when properly positioned on the nose, create a lifting action that opens nasal passages and reduces airflow resistance. Manufactured with hypoallergenic materials, the tira nasal is suitable for sensitive skin and can be worn comfortably throughout the night. The strip's effectiveness has been clinically proven to reduce snoring, aid in better breathing during physical activities, and provide relief from nasal congestion due to colds, allergies, or deviated septum conditions. Each strip is individually wrapped to maintain hygiene and adhesive properties, ensuring optimal performance when needed.

The strip's instant action provides immediate relief from nasal congestion, allowing users to breathe more freely as soon as it's applied. The medical-grade adhesive ensures the strip stays in place throughout the night while being gentle enough for daily use without irritating the skin. Users report significant reduction in snoring intensity and frequency, leading to better sleep quality not only for themselves but also for their partners. Athletes particularly benefit from the improved airflow during physical activities, experiencing enhanced performance and endurance. The tira nasal's discrete design makes it barely noticeable when worn, maintaining user confidence in social situations. Its versatility in addressing various breathing issues, from common colds to chronic nasal congestion, makes it a valuable addition to any medicine cabinet. The cost-effectiveness of the product, compared to pharmaceutical alternatives or medical procedures, provides excellent value for money. tiras nasales

Tiras nasales are innovative breathing aids designed to enhance nasal airflow and improve respiratory comfort. These small, adhesive strips are strategically engineered to gently lift and open nasal passages, facilitating easier breathing through the nose. The device consists of flexible, spring-like bands embedded in a specially formulated adhesive material that adheres comfortably to the bridge of the nose. When applied, these strips mechanically pull the sides of the nose outward, effectively widening the nasal passages and reducing airway resistance. The technology behind tiras nasales incorporates hypoallergenic materials that minimize skin irritation while maintaining strong adhesion throughout use. These devices are particularly effective during sleep, physical activity, or any situation where optimal breathing is essential. The strips work by counteracting nasal valve collapse, a common condition where the sides of the nose are drawn inward during inhalation, restricting airflow. With their anatomically optimized design, tiras nasales accommodate various nose shapes and sizes, ensuring broad user compatibility. They represent a non-invasive, drug-free solution for individuals seeking to improve their breathing efficiency without pharmaceutical intervention.

mouth tape oem

Mouth tape OEM services represent a specialized manufacturing solution in the sleep and wellness industry, offering customized production of high-quality mouth tapes designed to promote optimal nighttime breathing patterns. These manufacturers employ advanced materials and precision engineering to create gentle adhesive strips that effectively keep the mouth closed during sleep, encouraging nasal breathing. The manufacturing process incorporates medical-grade, hypoallergenic materials that ensure user safety and comfort throughout the night. These OEM facilities maintain strict quality control measures, implementing rigorous testing protocols to verify adhesive strength, breathability, and skin sensitivity compliance. The production capabilities typically include various size options, custom branding possibilities, and specialized adhesive formulations to meet diverse market demands. Modern mouth tape OEM facilities utilize automated production lines equipped with precise cutting tools and quality inspection systems, ensuring consistent product quality across large production runs. The manufacturing process also includes specialized packaging solutions that maintain product integrity and shelf life, while accommodating branded design elements for private label requirements. These facilities often maintain ISO certifications and follow GMP guidelines, demonstrating their commitment to manufacturing excellence and product safety standards.

Mouth tape OEM services offer numerous compelling advantages for businesses looking to enter or expand in the sleep wellness market. First, these manufacturers provide scalable production capabilities, allowing companies to adjust order volumes based on market demand without compromising product quality. The flexibility in customization options enables brands to create unique product offerings that align with their specific market positioning and customer needs. Professional OEM partners maintain updated certification compliance, reducing regulatory burden on the brand owner while ensuring product safety and quality standards are met. The manufacturers typically offer comprehensive support services, including material selection guidance, packaging design assistance, and quality control documentation. Cost efficiencies are achieved through optimized production processes and bulk material purchasing power, which can be passed on to clients. Advanced manufacturing technologies ensure consistent product quality, reducing waste and maintaining high production standards. The ability to access established supply chains and distribution networks can significantly reduce time-to-market for new products. OEM partners often provide valuable industry insights and technical expertise, helping brands develop competitive product specifications. The manufacturers maintain strict confidentiality agreements, protecting proprietary formulations and design elements. Additionally, these facilities often offer flexible payment terms and inventory management solutions, helping businesses maintain healthy cash flow while ensuring consistent product availability.

Advanced Material Technology

The mouth tape OEM manufacturing process utilizes cutting-edge material technology that sets new standards in comfort and effectiveness. The adhesive formulations are specifically engineered to provide secure overnight wear while being gentle on sensitive facial skin. These materials undergo extensive dermatological testing to ensure they meet or exceed safety standards for prolonged skin contact. The breathable fabric construction allows for adequate moisture management while maintaining adhesive integrity throughout the night. Advanced manufacturing techniques enable the production of ultra-thin, yet durable materials that provide a natural feel without compromising functionality. The material selection process prioritizes hypoallergenic properties and environmental sustainability, addressing both user safety and ecological concerns.

Customization Capabilities

OEM manufacturers offer extensive customization options that enable brands to create distinctive product offerings. This includes the ability to adjust tape dimensions, adhesive strength, and material composition to meet specific market requirements. The manufacturing process accommodates custom branding elements, including color matching, logo placement, and specialized packaging designs. Advanced printing technologies enable high-quality graphics and instructions directly on the product or packaging. The customization extends to packaging solutions, with options for various unit counts, display configurations, and retail-ready presentations. These capabilities allow brands to develop unique product lines that address specific market segments or user preferences.

Quality Assurance Systems

The OEM manufacturing facilities implement comprehensive quality assurance systems that ensure consistent product performance and safety. These systems include automated inspection points throughout the production process, monitoring critical parameters such as adhesive application consistency and material integrity. Regular testing protocols verify product performance under various environmental conditions, ensuring reliability across different usage scenarios. Documentation and traceability systems maintain detailed records of production batches, material sources, and quality control results. The facilities maintain certification with relevant regulatory bodies and industry standards organizations, demonstrating commitment to manufacturing excellence. Quality control measures extend to packaging and storage conditions, ensuring product integrity from production through distribution.

Исследуйте настраиваемые премиальные продукты для рта и носа, соответствующие глобальным стандартам; гибкое производство улучшает опыт глобальных клиентов.

  • Лента для рта
    Просмотреть больше
  • Носовые полоски

Специально разработанные дизайны для брендов здоровья, благополучия и спорта по всему миру — от концепции до реализации

Сертифицировано по ISO13485, ISO9001, CE и TGA, HLK Tape обладает более чем 20-летним опытом производства лент в своем автоматизированном заводе площадью 5,000 м², предлагая бесшовное решение от идеи до доставки.

  • Преимущество продукта: Наши ленты для рта и носа используют гипоаллергенный медицинский клей и экологически чистые материалы — вы можете настроить цвет, форму, вкус и упаковку для комфортного дыхания и длительного сцепления.
  • Преимущество сервиса: Мы принимаем небольшие минимальные заказы (от 10 штук), предоставляем бесплатные образцы (вы оплачиваете доставку), назначаем вам персонального менеджера проекта и отвечаем на запросы в среднем за два дня.
  • Технологическое преимущество: Полностью автоматизированные линии нанесения, намотки, разрезания и упаковки, а также мониторинг толщины и такности в реальном времени обеспечивают постоянство каждой партии.
  • Преимущество цены: Благодаря массовому автоматизированному производству, наша лента стоит всего $0.03–$0.06 за единицу при этом сохраняя высший уровень качества и международные сертификаты.
Откройте для себя пользовательские решения Honglinkai
