Лет
Опыт

О нас

Кто мы

Компания Quanzhou Honglinkai New Material Co. LTD была основана в 2012 году. Компания расположена в городе Цюаньчжоу, культурном городе Восточной Азии. Площадь составляет 5000 м2. Мы сосредоточились на специальном рынке лент более 20 лет. Специализируемся на производстве медицинских лент и носовых расширителей и т.д. Все наши товары имеют сертификацию и специальную команду по послепродажному обслуживанию. Включая серию производственных машин, нанесение покрытия, перемотку, разрезку, упаковку для удовлетворения различных потребностей.

Узнать больше
  • 1000

    Кооперативные клиенты

  • 2

    Среднее время ответа

  • 7

    Обычные производственные дни

  • 30

    Сотрудничающие логистические компании

Почему стоит сотрудничать с нами?

  • Опыт

    Обладая многолетним опытом работы в отрасли, мы понимаем потребности различных рынков и предлагаем индивидуальные рекомендации по продуктам.



    Наша команда сочетает техническую экспертизу с глубокими отраслевыми знаниями, чтобы предоставлять клиентам профессиональные консультации и поддержку.

  • Комплексная услуга по закупкам

    От рекомендаций по проектированию продуктов до производства. Наша команда оказывает полную поддержку, чтобы сделать процесс простым для наших клиентов.



    Улучшая управление цепочками поставок, мы обеспечиваем бесперебойный опыт покупки. Нужны ли вам небольшие индивидуальные заказы или крупные оптовые поставки, мы можем предоставить услуги, соответствующие вашим потребностям.

  • Соотношение стоимости и производительности

    Мы делаем упор на предоставление конкурентоспособных цен, сохраняя высокое качество продукции.



    Благодаря эффективному производству и эффекту масштаба, мы предлагаем продукцию высокого качества по более низким ценам, обеспечивая для наших клиентов наилучшую ценность за их деньги.

  • Скорость производства/доставки

    Наше производство эффективно и гибко, что позволяет нам быстро удовлетворять потребности клиентов.



    Мы обеспечиваем своевременную доставку, точное отслеживание и надежное управление цепочкой поставок, чтобы гарантировать своевременные поставки срочных заказов.

  • Опыт
  • Комплексная услуга по закупкам
  • Соотношение стоимости и производительности
  • Скорость производства/доставки

Отзывы клиентов

Амир бин Разак (директор по продажам в регионе Юго-Восточной Азии)

Мы сотрудничаем с производителем OEM-товаров для ухода за полостью рта в Юго-Восточной Азии уже 8 месяцев. Зрелые технологии фабрики обеспечивают соответствие и высокое качество носовых пластырей, а также гибкую возможность кастомизации (образцы — за неделю). Оптимизируйте межчасовой поясной обмен информацией — расширьте временные рамки ответа выделенного контактного лица. Надёжный партнёр на долгосрочную перспективу.

Читать далее

Карлос Гомес (генеральный менеджер по стратегии рынка Европы)

ODM-продукция фабрики — натуральные пластыри для ухода за полостью рта для Европы — впечатляет строгим контролем качества и быстрым обновлением упаковки. Срок выполнения пробных заказов небольшими партиями немного затянут; его оптимизация поможет расширению на нишевые рынки. Мы подтвердили объёмы заказов на 3 квартала, ожидаем более тесного сотрудничества.

Читать далее

Лим Вэй Цзе (менеджер по операционному управлению в Азиатско-Тихоокеанском регионе)

Мы выбрали эту фабрику для производства индивидуальных заказов носовых пластырей благодаря прозрачной цепочке поставок и своевременной доставке в 98 % случаев. Техническая команда дважды корректировала адгезию пластыря на область рта, чтобы соответствовать требованиям. Более гибкий контроль затрат повысил бы конкурентоспособность сотрудничества.

Читать далее

Оливье Дюбуа (директор по развитию глобального бизнеса / руководитель региона Европа)

Сотрудничая в области производства высококачественных носовых пластырей по OEM-технологии, фабрика использует безопасные для кожи, экологичные материалы и дизайн во французском стиле, отвечающие европейским стандартам. Хотя процессы немного громоздки, оптимизация эффективности без ущерба для качества позволит расширить сотрудничество.

Читать далее

Майкл Петерсон (вице-президент по работе с клиентами в Северной Америке)

Фабрика преуспевает в производстве OEM/ODM-продукции — пластырей на область рта и носа: на 30 % быстрее осуществляется кастомизация, стабильное качество и надежные цепочки поставок. Увеличение предварительного взаимодействия по вопросам соответствия нормативным требованиям Северной Америки позволит снизить последующие расходы; это один из лучших партнёров для расширения рынка Северной Америки.

Читать далее
Можем ли мы сделать маленький заказ?

Конечно, мы можем принимать небольшие заказы, но будет запрос MOQ, если это дизайн логотипа или печать.

Где находится ваш завод?

Завод по производству клейкой ленты HLK находится в районе Личэн, город Цюаньчжоу (Капитал Восточноазиатской Культуры), провинция Фуцзянь.

Сколько времени занимает производственный цикл для маленького заказа или большого заказа?

Малые заказы обычно занимают 3-7 дней, а крупные заказы — около 8-15 дней.

Можете ли вы делать другие размеры и упаковки для этого продукта?

Да, мы можем выполнить запрос по упаковке и размеру. Все соответствующие детали, пожалуйста, отправьте нам сообщение с запросом, и мы подтвердим это перед тем, как дать вам котировку.

Могу ли я получить несколько образцов для тестирования перед размещением заказа?

Конечно, мы можем предоставить вам бесплатные образцы, если вы согласны оплатить стоимость доставки.

Как убедиться в качестве продукции?

Согласно запросу клиента, мы отправим образцы для обеспечения удовлетворенности клиента. Кроме того, когда клиент подтверждает заказ, мы будем на связи с клиентом. Наконец, после отгрузки мы снова подтвердим информацию о продукте, чтобы способствовать длительному сотрудничеству в будущем.

Пожалуйста, добавьте наш WhatsApp, чтобы поделиться своими потребностями. Мы выберем соответствующие стили или случайным образом выберем готовые, и отправим их вместе с упаковкой. Пробы бесплатные — вам нужно только оплатить стоимость доставки (20–35 долларов). Нажмите, чтобы добавить WhatsApp

Progetti su misura per marche di salute, benessere e sport in tutto il mondo - dal concetto alla consegna

Certificato secondo ISO13485, ISO9001, CE e TGA, HLK Tape ha più di 20 anni di esperienza nella produzione di nastro adesivo in una fabbrica automatizzata di 5.000 m², offrendo una soluzione completa da un'unica fonte, dal concetto alla consegna.

  • Vantaggio del Prodotto: I nostri nastri per bocca e naso utilizzano adesivi ipoallergenici di grado medico e materiali ecocompatibili – e puoi personalizzare colore, forma, sapore e confezionamento per un comfort respiratorio e una tenuta duratura.
  • Vantaggio del Servizio: Accettiamo ordini minimi bassi (fino a 10 pezzi), forniamo campioni gratuiti (a tuo carico le spese di spedizione), ti assegniamo un responsabile progetto dedicato e rispondiamo alle richieste entro due giorni lavorativi in media.
  • Vantaggio Tecnologico: Linee completamente automatizzate per il rivestimento, il riarrottaggio, lo spezzamento e l'imballaggio, associate a un monitoraggio in tempo reale dello spessore e dell'adesività, garantisco la coerenza di ogni lotto.
  • Vantaggio di Prezzo: Grazie alla produzione su larga scala e automatizzata, il nostro nastro costa solo 0,03-0,06 $ al pezzo mantenendo qualità di primo livello e certificazioni internazionali.
Esplora la Soluzione Su Misura di Honglinkai

CERTIFICATI

Certificato di Analisi Mouthtape-Reach

Certificato di Prova Strisce Nasali

Certificato di Analisi Strisce Nasali-CE

Certificato di Analisi Strisce Nasali-Reach

Certificato di Analisi MSDS Strisce Nasali-Mouthtape

Certificato di Analisi Adesivo-SGS

Certificato di Analisi Cerotto per Bocca-CE

Certificato COC Cerotto per Bocca

RAPPORTO DI PROVA SGS

RAPPORTO DI PROVA SGS

RAPPORTO DI PROVA SGS

Più di 20

Anni di
Esperienza

Chi siamo

Chi Siamo

Quanzhou Honglinkai New Material Co. LTD è stata fondata nel 2012. L'azienda è situata nella città di Quanzhou, una città culturale dell'Estremo Oriente. Copre un'area di 5.000 m2. Ci siamo concentrati sul mercato delle nastro speciali per più di 20 anni. Specializzati nella produzione di Nastro per Bocca e Strisce Nasali, ecc. Tutti i nostri prodotti sono certificati e dispongono di un team speciale per il servizio post-vendita. Includendo serie di Macchine di Produzione, Rivestimento, Riavvolgimento, Taglio, Macchine di Imballaggio per soddisfare varie esigenze.

Scopri di più
  • 1000

    Clienti collaboratori

  • 2

    Tempo medio di risposta

  • 7

    Giorni di Produzione Regolari

  • 30

    Aziende logistische collaborative

PERCHÉ COLLABORARE CON NOI ?

  • Esperienza

    Grazie a anni di esperienza nel settore, comprendiamo le esigenze di diversi mercati e offriamo raccomandazioni di prodotto personalizzate.



    Il nostro team unisce competenze tecniche a una profonda conoscenza del settore, fornendo ai clienti orientamento professionale e supporto.

  • Servizio di acquisto one-stop

    Dalla progettazione del prodotto e suggerimenti sulla produzione. Il nostro team offre un supporto completo per rendere il processo semplice per i nostri clienti.



    Migliorando la gestione della catena di approvvigionamento, garantiamo un'esperienza d'acquisto senza intoppi. Che tu abbia bisogno di ordini personalizzati ridotti o di grossi quantitativi, possiamo fornire servizi adatti alle tue esigenze.

  • Prestazione costa

    Ci concentriamo sull'offrire prezzi competitivi mantenendo un'elevata qualità del prodotto.



    Grazie a una produzione efficiente e all'economia di scala, consegniamo prodotti di alta qualità a costi ridotti, offrendo ai nostri clienti il miglior rapporto qualità-prezzo.

  • Velocità di produzione/consegna

    La nostra produzione è efficiente e flessibile, permettendoci di soddisfare rapidamente le esigenze dei clienti.



    Garantiamo consegne puntuali, tracciamento preciso e una solida gestione della catena di approvvigionamento per assicurare spedizioni in tempo utile per ordini urgenti.

  • Esperienza
  • Servizio di acquisto one-stop
  • Prestazione costa
  • Velocità di produzione/consegna

Feedback dei Clienti

Amir bin Razak (Direttore Vendite Regionale Asia Sudorientale)

Collaboriamo da 8 mesi per la produzione OEM di patch nasali nell'Asia sudorientale. La tecnologia matura dello stabilimento garantisce prodotti conformi e ben aderenti, con possibilità di personalizzazione flessibile (campioni disponibili in una settimana). Per ottimizzare la comunicazione tra fusi orari diversi, si consiglia di estendere l'orario di risposta del contatto dedicato. Un partner affidabile per la collaborazione a lungo termine.

Leggi di più

Carlos Gómez (Responsabile Strategia Mercato Europa)

La produzione ODM di patch nasali a base di ingredienti naturali realizzata dallo stabilimento per il mercato europeo colpisce per il rigoroso controllo qualità e le rapide iterazioni di confezionamento. I tempi per i test su piccoli lotti sono leggermente lunghi; la loro ottimizzazione favorirebbe l'espansione in mercati di nicchia. Abbiamo già confermato ordini per 3 trimestri e guardiamo con favore a una collaborazione più profonda.

Leggi di più

Lim Wei Jie (Responsabile Gestione Operativa Asia-Pacifico)

Abbiamo scelto questo stabilimento per l'ODM di patch nasali grazie alla sua catena di approvvigionamento trasparente e al 98% di consegne puntuali. Il team tecnico ha modificato due volte l'adesione della patch per la bocca per soddisfare i requisiti. Un controllo dei costi più flessibile migliorerebbe la competitività della collaborazione.

Leggi di più

Olivier Dubois (Direttore Sviluppo Business Globale / Responsabile Regione Europa)

Collaborando su OEM di patch nasali di alta gamma, lo stabilimento utilizza materiali ecologici e delicati sulla pelle, con design in stile francese conforme agli standard europei. Sebbene i processi siano leggermente complessi, ottimizzando l'efficienza senza compromettere la qualità sarà possibile ampliare la collaborazione.

Leggi di più

Michael Peterson (Vicepresidente Relazioni con i Clienti America Settentrionale)

Lo stabilimento si distingue nell'OEM/ODM di patch per bocca/naso—personalizzazione del 30% più rapida, qualità stabile e catene di approvvigionamento affidabili. Aumentare la comunicazione preliminare sul rispetto delle normative nordamericane per ridurre i costi successivi; un partner eccellente per l'espansione nel mercato nordamericano.

Leggi di più
Possiamo fare un ordine piccolo?

Certo, possiamo accettare ordini piccoli, ma ci sarà una richiesta di QTM minima se si tratta di progettazione di logo o stampa.

Dove si trova la vostra fabbrica?

La fabbrica di nastro HLK è situata nel distretto di Licheng, Quanzhou (Capitale della Cultura dell'Estremo Oriente), provincia del Fujian.

Quanto dura il tempo di consegna per un ordine piccolo o grande?

Gli ordini piccoli di solito richiedono 3-7 giorni, mentre quelli grandi circa 8-15 giorni.

Potete produrre altre dimensioni e confezioni per questo prodotto?

Sì, possiamo soddisfare le richieste per confezione e dimensione. Inviateci gentilmente un messaggio di richiesta con tutti i dettagli rilevanti e li confermeremo prima di fornirvi una preventiva.

Posso ottenere alcuni campioni per testarli prima di effettuare l'ordine?

Certamente, possiamo fornirvi campioni gratuiti a condizione che accettiate il costo dell'espresso.

Come garantire la qualità dei prodotti?

Secondo la richiesta del cliente, invieremo campioni per assicurare la soddisfazione del cliente. Inoltre, quando il cliente conferma l'ordine, rimarremo in contatto con lui. Infine, dopo la spedizione, confermeremo nuovamente le informazioni sul prodotto al fine di facilitare una futura collaborazione a lungo termine.

Aggiungi il nostro WhatsApp per condividere le tue esigenze. Selezioneremo stili corrispondenti o sceglieremo quelli pronti a caso, e li invieremo insieme all'imballaggio. I campioni sono gratuiti, devi solo pagare la spesa di spedizione (20$–35$). Clicca per aggiungere WhatsApp

HLK Extra Strength Waterproof Nasal Strips CE‑Approved Better Breath 66×19 Sports Nasal Stripes OEM/ODM HLKTAPE

Introduction

Product General Information

Place of Origin: Fujian, China
Brand Name: HLK
Model Number: HLK-MT1
Certification: CE, ROHS
Minimum Order Quantity: 30 pieces
Price: Get a quote quickly + Free Sample Offer
Packaging Details: 15×10×0.01cm (per unit); 0.004kg (gross weight); 30pcs per set
Delivery Time: 12-20Days
Payment Terms: T/T, L/C, PayPal,
Supply Ability: 1,000,000 pieces per month

   

Quick Detail:
● Different names for the product: Waterproof Nasal Strips, Extra Strength Nasal Strips, Snore Relief Strips
● Main applications: Improve nasal airflow, relieve nasal congestion,reduce snoring
● Core specifications: 30pcs/set; Nonwoven/ PE; 3-year shelf life

  
Description:
Designed for active users, the HLK Better Breath Sports Nasal Strips use strong elastic lifting bands to open the nasal airway and boost oxygen intake. The non-woven, skin-safe construction ensures comfort during workouts or long training sessions. By improving airflow and reducing nasal resistance, the strips enhance performance and also help reduce snoring at night. OEM/ODM services allow full customization of size, color, and packaging.

   
Applications:
● Helps ease breathing in environments with smoke, dust, or pollution.
● Reduces nasal dryness and congestion during air travel.
● Encourages nasal breathing, helping prevent dry mouth and oral discomfort.
● Can be used to strengthen respiratory muscles and improve lung capacity.

   
Specifications:

Product Name HLK Better Breath Nasal Strips
Model Number HLK-MT1
Material Non-woven/PE/Cotton/ Satin
Quantity per Set 30 pieces
Shelf Life 1 year
Place of Origin Fujian, China
Certification CE, RECH
Packaging Size 15×10×0.01cm
Gross Weight (per unit) 0.004kg

   
Competitive Advantage:
● Mechanical airway expansion improves airflow
● Drug-free and safe for sensitive skin
● Suitable for both sleep and sports usage
● OEM/ODM customization available (branding, size, packaging)
● Large-size design fits higher/narrow nasal bridges (Western adult fit)
● Strong factory capacity for mass production

   
Tag:
Nasal Strip, Anti Snoring Nose Patch, Sports Nasal Strips, Better Breath Strip, Non-woven Breath Strip, Large Nasal Strip 66×19, OEM Nasal Strip Manufacturer, HLK Nasal Strip

NASAL STRIPS

Breathe Right Nasal Strips for Better Sleeping Stop Snoring Latex-Free Sports Nose Patch Tape Breathing HLK 2025

Get a Quote
  • Introduction
  • More Products

Introduction

Product General Information

Place of Origin: Fujian, China
Brand Name: HLK
Model Number: HLK-NP
Certification: CE, ROHS
Minimum Order Quantity: 30 pieces
Price: Get a quote quickly + Free Sample Offer
Packaging Details: 15×10×0.01cm (per unit); 0.004kg (gross weight); 30pcs per set
Delivery Time: 12-20Days
Payment Terms: T/T, L/C, PayPal,
Supply Ability: 1,000,000 pieces per month

   

Quick Detail:
● Different names for the product: Nighttime Breathing Aid,Snore Reduction Nasal Tape,Ultra-Strong Nasal Strips,Firm Grip Nasal Strips
● Main applications: Help relieve chronic sinus congestion,Reduce nasal blockage at night,Improve air passage for sensitive noses,Promote better airflow for children and adults
● Core specifications: non‑woven/PE + flexible internal support “spring‑like” structure, disposable single-use design.

   
Description:
HLK Better-Breath Waterproof Nasal Strips are engineered to enhance nasal airflow and improve breathing efficiency using a dual spring-frame system that gently lifts and expands the nasal passages. Constructed with medical-grade, hypoallergenic, and skin-friendly materials, these strips provide long-lasting comfort and safety, even for sensitive users. Their waterproof and sweat-resistant design ensures secure adhesion during sports, high-intensity workouts, cycling, running, or humid environments, making them ideal for both daytime activity and overnight sleep. The drug-free, non-invasive strips effectively reduce snoring, relieve nasal congestion caused by allergies, colds, or sinus pressure, and encourage nasal breathing over mouth breathing. The large 66×19 mm size fits adult noses with higher or broader bridges comfortably. OEM/ODM customization allows brands to adjust packaging, strip size, adhesive strength, and branding, providing a versatile solution for personal use, travel, fitness enthusiasts, and commercial distribution.

   
Applications:
● Pre-training warm-up to strengthen inspiratory muscles
● Resistance breathing exercises to boost lung capacity

News

Home /  News

Are Nasal Strips Suitable for the Cross-Border E-Commerce Market?

Mar.25.2026

Nasal strips, as simple yet effective tools for improving breathing, sleep, and athletic performance, have gained popularity in many regions. But are they suitable for cross-border sales? Let’s explore the opportunities, challenges, and strategies for taking nasal strips to international markets.

1. Market Potential

  • Global demand: Increasing awareness of sleep quality, sports performance, and general wellness drives demand for nasal strips worldwide.
  • Versatile applications: From everyday use for congestion relief to specialized performance use for athletes, nasal strips appeal to a wide consumer base.
  • Gift and wellness trend: Premium nasal strips with unique designs, scents, or packaging can be positioned as wellness gifts, enhancing their cross-border appeal.

2. Advantages for Cross-Border E-Commerce

  • Lightweight and small size: Nasal strips are easy to ship internationally, with low logistics costs compared to bulky products.
  • Long shelf life: Properly packaged nasal strips have a stable shelf life, reducing the risk of inventory loss during international transit.
  • Non-prescription product: Most nasal strips are categorized as cosmetic or general wellness products rather than medical devices, simplifying regulatory compliance in many markets.

3. Challenges in Cross-Border Sales

  • Regulatory differences: Some countries may require labeling in local languages, CE, FDA, or other certifications depending on classification.
  • Cultural preferences: Packaging, scent, color, or size preferences may vary by region, requiring market-specific customization.
  • Brand trust: Cross-border consumers often rely on brand reputation and verified reviews. New brands need strategies to build credibility quickly.

4. Strategies for Success

  • Compliance first: Ensure all labeling, safety, and documentation meet the target market requirements. This may include translations, certifications, or customs documentation.
  • Product differentiation: Offer standard and premium versions to cater to both mass-market and niche consumers. Unique scents, printed designs, or gift packaging can add value.
  • E-commerce platforms: Leverage global marketplaces such as Amazon, eBay, and regional platforms, while also building your own website for brand control.
  • Marketing localization: Tailor your messaging and campaigns to local consumer habits, seasonal trends, and cultural preferences.

5. Conclusion

Nasal strips are highly suitable for cross-border e-commerce due to their compact size, diverse use cases, and growing global wellness trends. Success depends on careful attention to regulations, localized marketing, and product differentiation. Brands that combine high-quality products with strategic international positioning can capture opportunities in global markets while minimizing risks.

The spacious 66×19 mm design fits adults with high or wide nasal bridges, ensuring better coverage and stability. The strips help alleviate snoring, congestion from allergies or colds, and difficulty breathing during sleep. Quick Detail:
● Different names for the product: Fresh Breathing Strips,Outdoor Sports Nasal Strips,Hiking Breathing Strips
● Main applications: Support healthy respiratory muscles,Help relax nasal tissues,Improve airflow for asthma-prone users,Promote efficient gas exchange in the lungs
● Core specifications: non‑woven/PE + flexible internal support “spring‑like” structure, disposable single-use design.

   
Description:
HLK Better-Breath Waterproof Nasal Strips provide everyday support for improved breathing, especially for individuals experiencing mild nasal obstruction, snoring, or congestion. The dual spring-frame gently lifts and expands the nasal passages, increasing airflow and reducing resistance for effortless respiration. Made with medical-grade hypoallergenic and skin-friendly materials, the strips are safe and comfortable for prolonged use. Their waterproof and sweat-resistant design ensures stable adhesion during daily activities, light exercise, or sleep. Drug-free and non-invasive, the strips promote nasal breathing, relieve congestion, and reduce snoring. The 66×19 mm large-size design fits adult noses with higher or broader bridges. OEM/ODM customization allows personalization of packaging, adhesive strength, strip size, and branding.

  
Applications:
● Breathing relaxation during long work hours
● Breathing support for athlete endurance
● Daily deep breathing to increase lung capacity

Mouth Tape

Home /  Mouth Tape

Premium Mouth Tapes

Mouth Tapes not only relieve dry, cracked or rough lips, but also improve sleep quality for people with snoring or mouth breathing problems. Perfect for health and wellness brands, Amazon sellers and custom OEM/ODM projects.

  • Medical-Grade: Soft and breathable, suitable for sensitive skin, commonly used for functional mouth tape.
  • Water-Soluble or Biodegradable Materials: Eco-friendly mouth tape emphasizing sustainability and skin-friendliness.
  • Adhesive Glue: Used to ensure the tape adheres securely, usually a hypoallergenic, residue-free medical adhesive or water-soluble glue, easy to remove without damaging the skin.

Customized Services Available

We support the customization of any logo, flavor, color,and shape,you only need to provide the corresponding sample picture.

Customized LOGO

MOQ: 500 bags

MOQ: 500 bags

MOQ: 3000 bags

Get a quote quickly

+ Free Sample Offer

Get a Free Quote

Features

Features of Our Mouth Tapes

Breathable

Allows air to flow naturally, ensuringcomfort during use without feeling suffocating.

Comfortable

Made with soft, skin-friendly materials that feel gentle even with prolonged wear.

Non-Irritating

Gentle on sensitive skin, reducing redness or discomfort during use.

Hypoallergenic

Formulated with medical-grade adhesives to minimize the risk of allergic reactions.

Anti-microbial

Designed to resist bacteria growth, promotingbetter hygiene and safety.

Easy Peel

Removes smoothly without pulling or leaving residue on the skin.

"

Technical Advantages in Production

Established in 2012 in culturally rich Quanzhou (East China), Quanzhou Honglinkai New Material Co., Ltd. is a reliable manufacturer of high-quality adhesive products. Boasting over 20 years of tape industry expertise, we’re renowned for innovative Mouth Tape and Nasal Strips meeting global customers’ diverse needs. Our 5,000 m² facility with advanced production machinery (precision coating, rewinding, slitting, packing) ensures consistent quality. All products have international certifications, and our dedicated after-sales team offers reliable support. We deliver excellent adhesive solutions via cutting-edge tech, strict quality control and customer-centricity.

  • Mouth tape production line

  • Nasal strips shape cutting die

  • Nasal strips production line

  • Precision machinery

Quality Certificate

Mouth Tape Production Process

1. Material Prep
Raw material preparation, dyeing & precise printing.
Incoming QC
2. Coating & Lamination
Advanced adhesive coating and material combination.
3. Manufacturing
Precision cutting and shaping of finished strips.
In-Process Check
4. Packaging
Sterile plastic packaging and final boxing.
Final Spot Check
5. Global Delivery
Ready for shipment to worldwide clients.

Production & Delivery

  • 7-10 Days
  • 1-3 Days
  • 4-10 Days

    Mehr anzeigen

Maßgeschneiderte Designs für Gesundheits-, Wellness- und Sportmarken weltweit – von der Konzeption bis zur Lieferung

Zertifiziert nach ISO13485, ISO9001, CE und TGA verfügt HLK Tape über mehr als 20 Jahre Erfahrung in der Herstellung von Klebeband in seiner 5.000 m² großen automatisierten Fabrik und bietet eine nahtlose, eine-Station-Lösung von der Idee bis zur Lieferung.

  • Produktvorteil: Unsere Mund- und Nasenbänder verwenden medizinisches, hypoallergenes Kleben und umweltfreundliche Materialien – und Sie können Farbe, Form, Geschmack und Verpackung anpassen, um eine atmungsaktive Bequemlichkeit und eine lange Haltbarkeit zu gewährleisten.
  • Servicevorteil: Wir akzeptieren geringe Mindestbestellungen (ab 10 Stück), bieten kostenlose Probestücke (Sie tragen die Versandkosten), weisen Ihnen einen dedizierten Projektmanager zu und beantworten Anfragen im Durchschnitt innerhalb von zwei Tagen.
  • Technischer Vorteil: Vollständig automatisierte Beschichtungs-, Aufwicklungs-, Schneidungs- und Verpackungslinien kombiniert mit Echtzeit-Überwachung der Dicke und Haftkraft sorgen dafür, dass jede Charge konsistent bleibt.
  • Preisvorteil: Dank großflächiger, automatisierter Produktion kostet unser Band nur 0,03–0,06 USD pro Stück, wobei dennoch höchste Qualität und internationale Zertifikate gewährleistet sind.
Entdecken Sie die maßgeschneiderten Lösungen von Honglinkai

Über uns

Über uns

Quanzhou Honglinkai New Material Co., Ltd. wurde im Jahr 2012 gegründet. Das Unternehmen befindet sich in der Stadt Quanzhou, einer kulturellen Stadt in Ostasien. Es erstreckt sich über eine Fläche von 5.000 m2. Wir konzentrieren uns seit mehr als 20 Jahren auf den Spezialbandmarkt und spezialisieren uns auf die Herstellung von Mundbändern & Nasenstreifen usw. Alle unsere Artikel sind zertifiziert und verfügen über ein spezielles Team für den Kundenservice. Dazu gehören Produktionsmaschinen-Serien, Beschichtung, Umspannung, Schlitzen und Verpackungsmaschinen, um verschiedene Anforderungen zu erfüllen.

Mehr erfahren
  • 1000

    Kooperative Kunden

  • 2

    Durchschnittliche Antwortzeit

  • 7

    Reguläre Produktionsstage

  • 30

    Kooperative Logistikunternehmen

Warum mit uns zusammenarbeiten?

  • Erfahrung

    Mit jahrelanger Erfahrung in der Branche verstehen wir die Bedürfnisse unterschiedlicher Märkte und bieten maßgeschneiderte Produktempfehlungen.



    Unser Team vereint technisches Know-how mit umfassendem Branchenwissen, um unseren Kunden professionelle Beratung und Unterstützung zu bieten.

  • Einkaufsservice aus einer Hand

    Von Produktdesignvorschlägen bis hin zur Fertigung: Unser Team bietet Ihnen eine umfassende Unterstützung, um den Prozess für unsere Kunden so einfach wie möglich zu gestalten.



    Durch die Verbesserung des Supply-Chain-Managements gewährleisten wir ein reibungsloses Einkaufserlebnis. Egal ob Sie kleine kundenspezifische Aufträge oder große Mengen im Großhandel benötigen – wir können Dienstleistungen anbieten, die perfekt zu Ihren Anforderungen passen.

  • Kostenleistung

    Wir legen besonderen Wert auf wettbewerbsfähige Preise, ohne dabei die hohe Produktqualität aus den Augen zu verlieren.



    Dank effizienter Produktion und Kostenvorteilen durch große Stückzahlen liefern wir hochwertige Produkte zu geringeren Kosten und bieten unseren Kunden so den bestmöglichen Preis-Leistungs-Wert.

  • Produktions-/Liefergeschwindigkeit

    Unsere Produktion ist effizient und flexibel, sodass wir schnell auf die Wünsche unserer Kunden reagieren können.



    Wir garantieren pünktliche Lieferung, präzise Sendungsverfolgung und ein starkes Supply-Chain-Management, um rechtzeitige Versandtermine auch bei dringenden Aufträgen sicherzustellen.

  • Erfahrung
  • Einkaufsservice aus einer Hand
  • Kostenleistung
  • Produktions-/Liefergeschwindigkeit

Kundenfeedback

Amir bin Razak (Direktor Verkauf Region Südostasien)

Wir arbeiten seit 8 Monaten bei der OEM-Produktion von Mundmasken für Südostasien zusammen. Die ausgereifte Technologie des Werks gewährleistet konforme, perfekt sitzende Nasenpflaster mit flexibler Anpassungsmöglichkeit (Muster in einer Woche). Optimieren Sie die Kommunikation über Zeitzonen hinweg – verlängern Sie den Reaktionszeitraum des festen Ansprechpartners. Ein zuverlässiger langfristiger Partner.

Mehr lesen

Carlos Gómez (Generalmanager Strategie Europa-Markt)

Das ODM-Angebot des Werks für Mundmasken mit natürlichen Inhaltsstoffen für Europa überzeugt durch strenge Qualitätskontrolle und schnelle Verpackungsiterationen. Die Vorlaufzeit für Kleinserientests ist leicht lang; deren Optimierung würde der Expansion in Nischenmärkte helfen. Wir haben bereits Aufträge für drei Quartale bestätigt und freuen uns auf eine engere Zusammenarbeit.

Mehr lesen

Lim Wei Jie (Manager Operations-Management Asien-Pazifik)

Wir haben diese Fabrik für das Nasenpflaster-ODM aufgrund ihrer transparenten Lieferkette und der 98-prozentigen termingerechten Lieferung ausgewählt. Das technische Team hat die Haftkraft des Mundpflasters zweimal angepasst, um die Anforderungen zu erfüllen. Eine flexiblere Kostenkontrolle würde die Wettbewerbsfähigkeit der Zusammenarbeit verbessern.

Mehr lesen

Olivier Dubois (Globaler Leiter Geschäftsentwicklung / Leiter Europa)

Bei der Zusammenarbeit im Bereich hochwertige Nasenpflaster-OEM erfüllen die hautfreundlichen, ökologischen Materialien und das französische Design der Fabrik europäische Standards. Obwohl die Prozesse leicht umständlich sind, wird die Optimierung der Effizienz bei gleichbleibender Qualität eine Erweiterung der Zusammenarbeit ermöglichen.

Mehr lesen

Michael Peterson (Vizepräsident Kundenbeziehungen Nordamerika)

Die Fabrik zeichnet sich bei Mund-/Nasenpflaster-OEM/ODM aus—30 % schnellere Anpassung, stabile Qualität und zuverlässige Lieferketten. Eine intensivere Vorabkommunikation hinsichtlich der gesetzlichen Vorschriften in Nordamerika würde spätere Kosten reduzieren; ein erstklassiger Partner für die Expansion im nordamerikanischen Markt.

Mehr lesen
Können wir eine kleine Bestellung aufgeben?

Sicher, wir akzeptieren kleine Bestellungen, aber es gibt eine Mindestbestellmenge (MOQ), wenn es sich um Logo-Design oder Druck handelt.

Wo befindet sich Ihre Fabrik?

Die HLK-Bandfabrik befindet sich im Bezirk Licheng, Quanzhou (Hauptstadt der Ostasiatischen Kultur), Provinz Fujian.

Wie lange dauert die Lieferzeit für kleine oder große Bestellungen?

Kleine Bestellungen dauern normalerweise 3-7 Tage, während große Bestellungen etwa 8-15 Tage dauern.

Können Sie andere Größen und Verpackungen für dieses Produkt herstellen?

Ja, wir können der Anfrage für Verpackung und Größe nachkommen. Bitte senden Sie uns alle relevanten Details in einer Anfrage-Nachricht, und wir werden dies vor dem Angebot mit Ihnen bestätigen.

Kann ich einige Proben für Tests erhalten, bevor ich eine Bestellung aufgebe?

Natürlich, wir können Ihnen kostenlose Proben zur Verfügung stellen, falls Sie die Versandkosten übernehmen möchten.

Wie kann die Qualität der Produkte gesichert werden?

Gemäß dem Wunsch des Kunden senden wir Proben, um die Zufriedenheit des Kunden zu gewährleisten. Außerdem bleiben wir in Kontakt mit dem Kunden, sobald dieser die Bestellung bestätigt. Schließlich überprüfen wir nach der Verschiffung nochmals die Produktinformationen, um eine langfristige Zusammenarbeit in Zukunft zu erleichtern.

Bitte füge unsere WhatsApp hinzu, um deine Bedarf zu teilen. Wir werden passende Stile auswählen oder zufällig fertige auswählen und sie zusammen mit der Verpackung senden. Proben sind kostenlos – du musst nur die Versandgebühr (20–35 USD) bezahlen. Klicke, um WhatsApp hinzuzufügen

News

Home /  News

Can Pre-Sales Power Growth for Facial Tape Brands?

Apr.07.2026

In today’s DTC landscape, smart brands don’t just produce and hope—they sell first, then scale. That’s the leverage of pre-sales.

But what about skin-contact products like mouth tapes and nasal tapes?
Are they too sensitive for pre-sale?

Short answer: No. In fact, they’re ideal—if done right.

1. Why Facial Tapes Work for Pre-Sale

Clear use case
Better sleep, easier breathing—simple, relatable benefits drive fast decisions.

Low complexity
No steep learning curve. Customers quickly understand what they’re buying.

Built for repeat
These are consumables. Win the habit, and you win long-term revenue.

2. You’re Selling Trust, Not Inventory

Customers aren’t buying a product—they’re buying confidence.

Their concerns are straightforward:

  • Will it irritate my skin?
  • Will removal hurt?
  • Will it leave residue?

Your job: eliminate doubt.

  • Emphasize hypoallergenic, latex-free, BPA-free
  • Be transparent about materials
  • Show real testing or user feedback
  • Explain why yours is better—clearly and quickly

3. The Real ROI: Validation

Pre-sale isn’t just about early cash—it’s about learning fast.

You’ll find out:

  • Which color converts
  • What customers value more (price vs. comfort)
  • What messaging actually works

Insight > initial revenue.

4. How to Make It Convert

Create urgency

  • Founder’s Edition
  • Limited first batch
  • Intro pricing

Make it feel early—and worth it.

Set clear timelines
Health products can’t afford long waits.
2–6 weeks is the sweet spot.

Be specific. Stay transparent. Update often.

Build a sharp landing page
Answer three questions fast:

  • What is it?
  • What does it solve?
  • Why you?

Then reinforce with visuals, use cases, and light science.

5. When Not to Pre-Sell

Don’t do it if:

  • The product isn’t finalized
  • Your timeline isn’t reliable
  • Your positioning is unclear
  • You’re overpromising

Pre-sale = ready, just not produced.

6. Bottom Line

Pre-sale isn’t a shortcut—it’s a strategy.

For facial tape brands, it helps you:

  • Validate demand
  • Reduce risk
  • Build your first loyal users

Done well, you don’t just launch—you start with momentum.

For a premium brand like Still Hour, pre-sale isn’t optional—

👉 It’s your smartest first move.

Prev : None

Next : OEM Nose Strip Procurement Risk Control Guide

LEARN MORE >>

Description:
HLK Better-Breath Waterproof Nasal Strips deliver efficient nasal dilation through a high-elasticity dual spring system that gently opens the nasal passages to enhance airflow. Constructed using medical-grade, skin-friendly materials, the strips offer irritation-free comfort suitable for daily wear or nighttime sleep. Their waterproof and sweat-proof performance makes them ideal for athletes, fitness enthusiasts, and individuals living in humid or warm environments. Drug-free and non-invasive, they provide a natural solution for improving breathing without depending on nasal sprays or medication. The large 66×19 mm size is engineered to accommodate a variety of adult nose shapes, particularly those with elevated or broad nasal bridges. Effective in reducing snoring, easing congestion, and supporting deep breathing, the strips help users achieve more restful sleep and improved respiratory performance. HLK’s OEM/ODM customization allows flexible branding options, tailored packaging, adjustable adhesive strength, and material variations to meet diverse business strategies.

   
Applications:
Breathing warm-up before running
Morning lung capacity activation
Pre-training for extreme sports (skiing, climbing)

Scented Nasal Strips: Combining Better Breathing with Aromatherapy for Stress Relief

Mar.16.2026

In modern life, increasing workloads, digital distractions, and daily pressures have made stress and anxiety common experiences for many people. While traditional stress-management approaches such as meditation, exercise, and therapy remain effective, consumers are also turning to convenient wellness products that can be integrated easily into their everyday routines.

One emerging innovation in this field is scented nasal strips. These products combine the mechanical benefits of traditional nasal strips with the therapeutic properties of aromatherapy. By helping open the nasal passages while releasing calming or refreshing fragrances, scented nasal strips provide a dual function: improving breathing efficiency and supporting emotional relaxation.

Unlike standard nasal strips that only focus on airflow, scented versions introduce carefully selected aromatic compounds that can positively influence mood, energy levels, and mental clarity. As interest in holistic wellness continues to grow, scented nasal strips are becoming a popular tool for individuals seeking practical, non-invasive ways to manage stress throughout the day.

How Aromatherapy Influences Stress and Emotional Balance

The Connection Between the Olfactory System and the Brain

The human sense of smell is closely connected to the brain regions responsible for emotion and memory. When aromatic molecules enter the nasal passages, they stimulate the olfactory receptors, which send signals directly to parts of the brain such as the amygdala and hippocampus. These areas play critical roles in emotional processing, mood regulation, and stress responses.

Because of this direct neurological pathway, certain scents can immediately trigger feelings of relaxation, alertness, or comfort. This is the scientific foundation behind aromatherapy and explains why fragrance-based wellness products can influence emotional states quickly and effectively.

Scented nasal strips utilize this mechanism by delivering gentle aromatic compounds continuously while the strip is worn. The steady release of fragrance provides a consistent sensory stimulus, helping users maintain a balanced emotional state during stressful situations or busy daily routines.

Physiological Effects of Scent on Stress Reduction

Aromatherapy not only influences emotional perception but also affects physiological responses related to stress.

Certain scents commonly used in scented nasal strips have been studied for their ability to:

  • reduce cortisol levels, the body’s primary stress hormone

  • support parasympathetic nervous system activity

  • improve breathing patterns and oxygen intake

When these aromatic compounds are combined with the mechanical effect of nasal strips—which physically open the nasal passages—the result is a synergistic wellness effect. Users benefit from both improved breathing efficiency and gentle sensory stimulation that promotes relaxation.

This combination makes scented nasal strips particularly appealing to individuals seeking natural, drug-free methods of stress management.

Popular Aromatic Ingredients and Their Benefits

Different scents are used in nasal strips to create specific emotional and physiological effects. Each aroma offers unique benefits depending on the user’s needs.

Lavender for Relaxation and Sleep Support

Lavender is one of the most widely recognized scents in aromatherapy due to its calming properties. Compounds found in lavender essential oil, such as linalool, are known to promote relaxation and reduce feelings of anxiety.

Lavender scented nasal strips are often used in the evening or before bedtime because they may help:

  • calm the nervous system

  • reduce mental tension

  • support better sleep quality

Many users report that lavender-based aromatherapy helps them fall asleep more quickly and experience deeper rest.

Eucalyptus for Clear Breathing and Refreshment

Eucalyptus is commonly used in respiratory wellness products due to its refreshing and cooling characteristics. When incorporated into nasal strips, eucalyptus provides a clean, invigorating scent that complements the strip’s breathing support function.

Benefits often associated with eucalyptus scented nasal strips include:

  • enhanced feeling of nasal clarity

  • improved breathing comfort

  • mental refreshment during periods of fatigue or stress

This scent is particularly popular among individuals who use nasal strips during exercise or demanding work activities.

Mint for Focus and Mental Clarity

Mint and menthol-based aromas are known for their energizing effects. These scents stimulate the senses and can help reduce mental fatigue, making them suitable for daytime use.

Mint scented nasal strips are often used by people who want to:

  • stay focused during work or study

  • maintain alertness during long tasks

  • refresh their senses in stressful environments

The cooling sensation associated with mint also contributes to a feeling of improved airflow and comfort.

Practical Uses of Scented Nasal Strips in Daily Life

Managing Workplace Stress

Modern work environments often involve tight deadlines, long hours, and high levels of mental concentration. Scented nasal strips provide a subtle and convenient way to access aromatherapy benefits without disturbing coworkers.

Because most nasal strips are transparent or skin-toned, they remain discreet and unobtrusive, allowing users to wear them comfortably throughout the workday.

Many professionals use scented nasal strips during:

  • important meetings

  • high-pressure work periods

  • long hours of computer work

The improved breathing and gentle fragrance can help maintain mental balance and reduce tension during demanding situations.

Enhancing Exercise and Physical Activity

Exercise is widely recognized as an effective stress-relief activity. Scented nasal strips can enhance the exercise experience by improving breathing efficiency while providing refreshing sensory stimulation.

Athletes and fitness enthusiasts often choose eucalyptus or mint scented nasal strips to help them feel more energized during workouts. The improved airflow may support better oxygen intake, while the invigorating scent encourages motivation and focus.

Additionally, calming scents such as lavender can be used after exercise to support relaxation and recovery.

Supporting Holistic Wellness Practices

Scented nasal strips can also be integrated into broader wellness routines. Many individuals incorporate them into activities such as:

  • meditation

  • yoga sessions

  • relaxation exercises

  • travel or commuting routines

Because the strips are lightweight and portable, they provide an accessible form of aromatherapy without requiring diffusers or additional equipment.

Over time, consistent use can help establish positive self-care habits that contribute to long-term emotional balance.

Safety Considerations and Proper Use

While scented nasal strips are generally considered safe for most users, certain guidelines should be followed to ensure the best experience.

Users should:

  • apply the strip to clean, dry skin

  • follow recommended wear times, typically 6–12 hours

  • remove the strip gently to avoid skin irritation

Individuals with sensitive skin may wish to perform a patch test before full use.

People with severe nasal congestion, allergies to specific aromatic ingredients, or underlying respiratory conditions should consult a healthcare professional before using scented nasal strips.

Product Quality and Manufacturing Standards

The effectiveness and safety of scented nasal strips depend heavily on product quality. Reliable manufacturers use carefully selected materials and maintain strict production standards.

High-quality products typically include:

  • breathable flexible strip materials

  • medical-grade adhesives that are skin-friendly

  • controlled concentrations of fragrance compounds

  • safe, dermatologically tested ingredients

Proper storage conditions are also important. Products should be kept in cool, dry environments to preserve both the adhesive performance and aromatic potency.

Conclusion

Scented nasal strips represent an innovative development within the growing wellness industry. By combining improved nasal airflow with the psychological benefits of aromatherapy, these products offer a convenient way to support both physical breathing comfort and emotional relaxation.

As awareness of stress management and holistic health continues to expand, scented nasal strips are likely to play an increasingly important role in everyday wellness routines. Their portability, simplicity, and dual-function design make them a practical option for individuals seeking effective, non-invasive solutions for managing daily stress.

Wayne Wu

HLK Better-Breath Waterproof Nasal Strips enhance breathing during gym workouts, weight training, and high-intensity interval exercises. The dual spring-frame gently lifts and expands nasal passages, improving airflow and oxygen intake to support performance and reduce fatigue. Made from medical-grade hypoallergenic materials, the strips are comfortable for prolonged wear and safe for sensitive skin. Their waterproof and sweat-resistant design ensures the strips stay securely in place during intense workouts, even in humid environments. Drug-free and non-invasive, they reduce nasal congestion, prevent mouth breathing, and promote effective respiration. The 66×19 mm large-size design fits adult noses with higher or broader bridges. OEM/ODM customization options allow adjustments to packaging, adhesive strength, strip size, and branding for commercial or personal use.

   
Applications:

● Resistance breathing exercises to boost lung capacity

News

Home /  News

Stamped Nose Strips: How Small Prints Become Social Currency for Youthful Brands

Mar.31.2026

In the era of the “looks economy” and Gen Z dominance, detail aesthetics is gradually replacing old-school brand worship. Young consumers no longer settle for products that simply “work well”—they demand products that look good, feel fun, and are worth sharing.

Among the many skincare and beauty categories, one product once defined as purely functional is quietly making a comeback: the nose strip. While traditional blackhead strips focus solely on extraction, youth-oriented brands are reinventing them with stamped designs, turning a mundane skincare routine into a ritual worth capturing and sharing.

1. From “Hide It” to “Show It”: A Shift in Usage Scenarios

Traditional nose strips were typically used in private—some might even feel embarrassed walking around with one on.

Stamped nose strips flip that narrative entirely. By incorporating playful designs—fruits, doodles, slogans, brand mascots—into the strip itself, the skincare process becomes a visual statement.

For younger users, snapping a selfie with a stamped nose strip is no longer an embarrassing moment. Instead, it becomes an authentic, fun expression of self-care. This shift from “hiding” to “showing” gives the product built-in shareability.

2. How Stamped Nose Strips Empower Youth-Focused Brands

1. A Mobile Billboard for Brand Identity

For independent DTC brands, stamped nose strips offer one of the most intimate branding opportunities. You can print your logo, mascot, or signature elements directly onto the strip.

When users share their photos on social media, your brand appears right on their face—literally. Compared to packaging boxes or inserts, this creates a more personal and highly visible form of brand exposure.

2. Creating Social Currency

Young consumers often buy products not just for utility, but for the conversation they spark. Stamped nose strips naturally invite interaction:

  • “Today I’m wearing the bubble tea strip—what about you?”

  • “Seven days, seven moods, seven prints.”

  • “Doing nose strips with my bestie—it’s like playing with stickers as kids.”

When the product itself becomes a conversation starter, users transform from passive buyers into active content creators for your brand.

3. Tapping Into the “Joy Economy”

Today’s young shoppers seek more than efficacy—they crave comfort and emotional value.

With their cute and expressive designs, stamped nose strips turn a once-unpleasant extraction process into a lighthearted ritual. Users may repurchase simply to collect different prints or feel an emotional attachment to a design that brightens their routine.

3. How to Execute a Stamped Nose Strip Strategy on Your Independent Site

If your independent brand targets a young, trend-forward audience—whether in beauty, skincare, or lifestyle—here are a few ways to bring stamped nose strips to life:

1. Collaborations & Limited Editions

Partner with illustrators, streetwear labels, or even viral meme IPs to launch limited-edition prints. Scarcity drives conversation and boosts both average order value and repeat purchases.

2. Mystery Box / Blind Box Sales

Package stamped nose strips in blind-box formats, where users don’t know which print they’ll get until they open it. This taps into Gen Z’s love for surprise, collectability, and share-worthy unboxings.

3. User-Generated Content (UGC) Campaigns

Encourage customers to post photos wearing your stamped nose strips. Create a branded hashtag (e.g., #StripSelfie) and feature the best submissions on your site or social channels. Reward contributors with discounts or early access to new designs.

4. Curated Themed Sets

Bundle strips into themed sets like “Gal’s Night In” or “Couple’s Fun Pack.” This expands the product’s role from personal skincare to a social activity, increasing gifting appeal and average basket size.

4. Small Stamp, Big Opportunity

Across successful DTC brands and emerging beauty labels, one pattern stands out: products that combine a simple format with creative expression often generate outsized organic reach at minimal marketing cost.

Stamped nose strips are a perfect example of small details making a big impact. They don’t require complex technology, but they instantly differentiate your brand on shelf and on screen. For youthful brands, each strip becomes more than a skincare tool—it becomes a ticket into your customer’s social circle.

  • Productvoordeel: Onze mondstuk- en neusplakband gebruiken medisch gradige, hypoallergene lijmstoffen en milieuvriendelijke materialen – en u kunt de kleur, vorm, smaak en verpakking aanpassen voor een comfortabele ademhaling en langdurig houden.
  • Servicevoordeel: We accepteren lage minimale bestellingen (vanaf 10 stuks), bieden gratis monsters (u betaalt verzending), wijzen u een gewijde projectmanager toe, en beantwoorden vragen binnen twee dagen gemiddeld.
  • Technologisch voordeel: Volledig geautomatiseerde coating-, opwind-, snijd- en verpakkingslijnen, gekoppeld aan real-time dikte- en tack-controle, zorgen ervoor dat elke partij consistent blijft.
  • Prijsvoordeel: Dankzij grote schaalvergroting en geautomatiseerde productie kost ons plakband slechts $0,03–$0,06 per stuk, terwijl we toch voldoen aan topkwaliteit en internationale certificaten.
Ontdek Honglinkai Aangepaste Oplossingen

CERTIFICATEN

Jaar
Ervaring

Over ons

Wie wij zijn

Quanzhou Honglinkai New Material Co. LTD is opgericht in 2012. Het bedrijf is gevestigd in de stad Quanzhou, een culturele stad in Oost-Azië. Met een oppervlakte van 5.000 m2. We hebben ons meer dan 20 jaar gericht op de speciale plakbandmarkt. Specialiserend in de productie van Mondplakband & Neusstrips, enz. Alle onze artikelen komen met certificeringen en hebben een speciaal team voor nasale service. Inclusief reeks Productiemachines, Coating, Rewinding, Slitting, Verpakkingsmachines om verschillende behoeften te voldoen.

Meer Informatie
  • 1000

    Coöperatieve klanten

  • 2

    Gemiddelde responsijd

  • 7

    Reguliere productiedagen

  • 30

    Samenwerkende logistieke bedrijven

WAAROM SAMENWERKEN MET ONS ?

  • Ervaring

    Met jaren ervaring in de industrie begrijpen we de behoeften van verschillende markten en bieden we op maat gemaakte productaanbevelingen.



    Ons team combineert technische expertise met diepgaande kennis van de industrie om professionele begeleiding en ondersteuning aan onze klanten te bieden.

  • Eenmalige aankoopdienst

    Van productontwerpaanbevelingen tot productie. Ons team biedt volledige ondersteuning om het proces eenvoudig te maken voor onze klanten.



    Door de supply chain management te verbeteren, garanderen wij een soepele aankoopervaring. Of u nu kleine op maat gemaakte bestellingen of grote groothandels nodig heeft, wij kunnen diensten bieden die aan uw behoeften voldoen.

  • Kostenprestaties

    We richten ons op het aanbieden van concurrerende prijzen, terwijl we de kwaliteit van onze producten hoog houden.



    Dankzij efficiënte productie en schaaleconomieën leveren wij producten van topkwaliteit tegen lagere kosten, waardoor onze klanten de beste waarde voor hun geld krijgen.

  • Productie/leverings­snelheid

    Onze productie is efficiënt en flexibel, waardoor wij snel aan de behoeften van onze klanten kunnen voldoen.



    Wij zorgen voor tijdige levering, nauwkeurige tracking en sterke supply chain management om zo de garantie van tijdige verzending van dringende bestellingen te waarborgen.

  • Ervaring
  • Eenmalige aankoopdienst
  • Kostenprestaties
  • Productie/leverings­snelheid

Feedback van Klanten

Amir bin Razak (Regio-directeur Verkoop Zuidoost-Azië)

We werken al 8 maanden samen aan OEM-mondpatches voor Zuidoost-Azië. De geavanceerde technologie van de fabriek zorgt voor conformiteit en goed passende neuspatches, met flexibele aanpassingen (proeven in een week). Optimaliseer de communicatie over tijdzones heen door het reactievenster van het toegewijde contact te verlengen. Een betrouwbare partner op lange termijn.

Lees meer

Carlos Gómez (Algemeen Manager Marktstrategie Europa)

De ODM-mondpatches op basis van natuurlijke ingrediënten van de fabriek voor Europa imponeren door strikte kwaliteitscontrole en snelle verpakkingsiteraties. De doorlooptijd voor kleine proefseries is iets lang; optimalisering hiervan ondersteunt uitbreiding naar niche markten. We hebben al drie kwartalen aan orders bevestigd en kijken uit naar verdere samenwerking.

Lees meer

Lim Wei Jie (Manager Operationeel Beheer Azië-Pacific)

We kozen voor deze fabriek voor ODM-neuspatches vanwege de transparante supply chain en de 98% tijdige levering. Het technische team heeft de hechting van de mondpatch tweemaal aangepast om aan de eisen te voldoen. Meer flexibele kostenbeheersing zou het concurrentievermogen van de samenwerking kunnen verbeteren.

Lees meer

Olivier Dubois (Global Business Development Director / Hoofd Europa)

Bij samenwerking aan high-end OEM-neuspatches voldoen de huidvriendelijke, eco-materialen en het Franse design van de fabriek aan Europese normen. Hoewel de processen enigszins omslachtig zijn, zal het optimaliseren van efficiëntie zonder kwaliteitsverlies de uitbreiding van de samenwerking mogelijk maken.

Lees meer

Michael Peterson (Vicepresident Customer Relaties Noord-Amerika)

De fabriek onderscheidt zich in OEM/ODM-mond/neuspatches — 30% snellere customisatie, stabiele kwaliteit en betrouwbare supply chains. Meer voorafgaande communicatie over naleving van voorschriften in Noord-Amerika kan latere kosten verlagen; een toprelatie voor uitbreiding op de Noord-Amerikaanse markt.

Lees meer
Kunnen we een kleine bestelling plaatsen?

Zeker, we kunnen kleine bestellingen accepteren, maar er is een MOQ vereiste als het gaat om logoontwerp of printen.

Waar is je fabriek gelegen?

De HLK tape fabriek is gevestigd in het district Licheng, Quanzhou (Hoofdstad van Oost-Aziatische Cultuur), provincie Fujian.

Hoe lang duurt de levertijd voor een kleine of grote bestelling?

Kleine bestellingen duren meestal 3-7 dagen, terwijl grote bestellingen ongeveer 8-15 dagen duren.

Kunnen jullie andere maten en verpakkingen voor dit product maken?

Ja, we kunnen volgens verzoek de verpakking en grootte afronden. Stuur alstublieft alle relevante details via een vraag naar ons toe, en bevestigen we dit voor u voordat we een offerte maken.

Kan ik wat monsters krijgen voor testen voordat ik een bestelling plaats?

Natuurlijk, we kunnen u gratis monsters versturen als u de verzendkosten wilt betalen.

Hoe kunnen we de kwaliteit van de producten verzekeren?

Volgens de vraag van de klant sturen wij monsters om de tevredenheid van de klant te waarborgen. Bovendien, wanneer de klant de bestelling bevestigt, blijven we in contact met de klant. Tenslotte, na verzending, bevestigen we de productinformatie opnieuw om toekomstige lange termijn samenwerking te vergemakkelijken.

Voeg onze WhatsApp toe om je behoeften te delen. Wij selecteren overeenkomstige stijlen of kiezen willekeurig uit gereedgemaakte, en sturen ze samen met verpakking. monsters zijn gratis - je hoeft alleen de verzendkosten te betalen ($20-$35). Klik om WhatsApp toe te voegen

NASAL STRIPS

Nose Tape for Better Breathing and Sleeping Hypoallergenic Soft Safe Immediate Relief Customized Cute Colorful Pattern HLK

Get a Quote
  • Introduction
  • More Products

Introduction

Product General Information

Place of Origin: Fujian, China
Brand Name: HLK
Model Number: HLK-NP
Certification: CE, ROHS
Minimum Order Quantity: 30 pieces
Price: Get a quote quickly + Free Sample Offer
Packaging Details: 15×10×0.01cm (per unit); 0.004kg (gross weight); 30pcs per set
Delivery Time: 12-20Days
Payment Terms: T/T, L/C, PayPal,
Supply Ability: 1,000,000 pieces per month

   

Quick Detail:
● Different names for the product: Outdoor Adventure Nasal Strips,Waterproof Breathing Strips,Night Shift Sleep Strips,Long Flight Nasal Strips
● Main applications: Reduce nighttime mouth breathing,Improve sleep for partners of snorers,Help maintain normal breathing patterns
● Core specifications: non‑woven/PE + flexible internal support “spring‑like” structure, disposable single-use design.

   
Description:
HLK Better-Breath Waterproof Nasal Strips are designed to improve long-term sleep quality by promoting consistent nasal breathing and reducing snoring. The dual spring-frame gently lifts and expands the nasal passages, lowering airflow resistance and supporting deep, restorative sleep. Constructed from medical-grade hypoallergenic materials, the strips are comfortable and safe for sensitive skin. Their waterproof and sweat-resistant design maintains secure adhesion overnight. Drug-free and non-invasive, the strips help relieve congestion caused by colds, allergies, or sinus pressure. The 66×19 mm large-size design ensures adult noses with higher or broader bridges are accommodated comfortably. OEM/ODM customization allows full adjustment of packaging, branding, adhesive strength, and strip size for home or commercial use.

   
Applications:
● Enhance lung capacity during aerobic exercise
● Resistance breathing exercises to boost lung capacity
● Daily deep breathing to increase lung capacity

   
Specifications

Product Name HLK Anti Snoring Patch
Model Number HLK-NP
Material Non‑woven/PE
Quantity per Set 30 pieces
Shelf Life 1 year
Place of Origin Fujian, China
Certification CE, RECH
Packaging Size 15×10×0.01cm
Gross Weight (per unit) 0.004kg

   
Competitive Advantage:
● Focused on nasal and medical adhesive products for years with a strong industry reputation.
● Capable of product iteration, continuously releasing market-adapted bestsellers.
● Brand strategy consulting helps clients create differentiated selling points.

   
Tag:
Brand strategy consulting helps clients create differentiated selling points.Hypoallergenic Nasal Sticker,Drug-Free Nasal Relief Patch

News

Home /  News

OEM Nose Strip Procurement Risk Control Guide

Apr.03.2026

With the growing demand for sleep health and sports performance products, OEM nose strips are becoming a fast-growing market segment. However, many brands face challenges such as inconsistent quality, complex regulatory requirements, and delivery delays during procurement.

HLK, with years of OEM manufacturing experience, has established a mature and complete risk control system, ensuring product stability and compliance throughout the entire production and delivery process.

1. Comprehensive Certifications to Ensure Market Access

HLK fully meets international market requirements:

  • Certified under ISO 13485 Medical Device Quality Management System
  • Products comply with CE and other international standards
  • Extensive experience in exporting to Europe and North America

We provide complete compliance documentation to help brands enter target markets smoothly and reduce registration and sales risks.

2. Medical-Grade Materials for Product Safety

For skin-contact products, HLK strictly controls material quality:

  • Uses medical-grade, low-allergen adhesives (acrylic/silicone-based)
  • Provides MSDS and biocompatibility test reports
  • Materials are breathable and comfortable for sensitive skin

This ensures safety and reliability for everyday use or high-sweat scenarios.

3. Standardized Sample Testing to Ensure Production Consistency

HLK offers a systematic sample testing process:

  • Adhesion testing (regular & high-tack versions)
  • Comfort and flexibility evaluation
  • Printing quality and appearance inspection (matte / customized finishes)

Through strict sample confirmation, we ensure mass production matches the approved sample, avoiding deviations.

4. Clear and Transparent Cost Structure

We provide structured quotations to help brands make informed decisions:

  • Tiered pricing based on different MOQs
  • Detailed printing and customization costs
  • Multiple packaging options (bag / box / customized)

No hidden costs, making it easier to plan budgets and inventory.

5. One-Stop Packaging and Regulatory Support

HLK can assist clients with complete packaging and compliance:

  • Support for IFU (Instructions for Use) content
  • Multi-language labeling compliant with EU regulations
  • Assistance with barcodes, UDI, and other compliance requirements

Ideal for brands planning to enter European or North American markets.

6. Stable Production and Delivery

HLK has a mature production and delivery system:

  • Standard lead time: 15–30 days
  • Real-time production progress updates
  • Transparent and reliable shipping information

Effectively reducing the risks of false shipment notifications or delivery delays.

7. Multi-Level Quality Control

Quality control runs through the entire production process:

  • Pre-production sample approval
  • In-process inspection
  • Final inspection before shipment

Ensures consistency and stability in adhesion, appearance, and user experience for every batch.

8. Safe and Standardized Cooperation Process

HLK provides a standardized and secure cooperation workflow:

  • Clear contract terms (specifications, quality standards, lead time)
  • Standard payment: 50% deposit + 50% before shipment
  • Supports multiple secure payment methods

Fully safeguards order execution and ensures a secure collaboration.

9. Support for Long-Term Brand Growth

HLK focuses not only on order fulfillment but also on brand development:

  • Support from small-scale testing to large-scale production
  • Offers multi-dimensional customization (color / pattern / scent, etc.)
  • Allows early locking of long-term pricing strategy

Helping brands scale from launch to growth efficiently.

10. Long-Term Partnership and Co-Creation

HLK aims to be a long-term partner, not just a supplier:

  • Efficient communication and fast response
  • Continuous product optimization
  • Support for brand differentiation and market positioning

Summary

OEM nose strip procurement is not just about price comparison but a comprehensive evaluation of quality, compliance, delivery, and supply chain stability.

HLK, with complete certifications, strict quality management, and mature production capabilities, covers all key risk points in the OEM process.

If you are looking for a reliable, professional, and long-term manufacturing partner, HLK is your trusted choice.

Contact Us

For more information or to discuss your OEM project, feel free to reach out:

Name: Vicky Zhou
Call/Text: + (86) 198 0595 7675
Email: [email protected]
Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/vvickyzhou_1999

Nasal Strips

Wholesale Nasal Strips

Nasal Strips provide an effective, drug-free solution to improve airflow and reduce nasal congestion. By gently lifting the nasal passages, they help relieve snoring, enhance breathing during physical activity, and support post-surgery recovery. Perfect for health and wellness brands, Amazon sellers, and custom OEM/ODM projects.

  • Materials: Non-woven Fabric, Transparent PE, Cotton Satin.
  • Adhesive: Henkel’s medical-grade, hypoallergenic adhesive.
  • Enhancements: Customizable with refreshing scent such as lavender, eucalyptus, and mint.

Established in 2012 in culturally rich Quanzhou (East China), Quanzhou Honglinkai New Material Co., Ltd. is a reliable manufacturer of high-quality adhesive products. Boasting over 20 years of tape industry expertise, we’re renowned for innovative Mouth Tape and Nasal Strips meeting global customers’ diverse needs. Our 5,000 m² facility with advanced production machinery (precision coating, rewinding, slitting, packing) ensures consistent quality. All products have international certifications, and our dedicated after-sales team offers reliable support. We deliver excellent adhesive solutions via cutting-edge tech, strict quality control and customer-centricity.

MOUTH TAPE

HLK 6-In-1 Nourishing Silicone Mouth Tape - Vitamin, Aloe, COQ10 & Collagen Infused

Experience better sleep and improved lip health with HLK’s innovative Infused Mouth Tape. Made from premium silicone, this high-quality tape is enhanced with six powerful ingredients—vitamin-rich aloe vera, skin-loving collagen, and rejuvenating CoQ10—working synergistically to nourish and hydrate your lips while you sleep.Its gentle, residue-free adhesive encourages natural nose breathing, helps reduce snoring, and prevents lip dryness overnight. Our unique infusion technology ensures the beneficial nutrients are slowly released throughout the night, leaving you with softer, more supple lips by morning.Perfect for anyone looking to boost sleep quality while caring for lip wellness, the hypoallergenic silicone is comfortable for extended wear and easy to remove. Making it a convenient addition to your nightly self-care routine.

News

Home /  News

Why Strategic Material Combination in Facial Patches Matters

Mar.31.2026

1. Backing Material: The Foundation

The backing determines breathability, comfort, and how well the patch conforms to the skin.

  • Non-woven fabric: soft and breathable, ideal for everyday use

  • Hydrocolloid: absorbs moisture, promotes healing, but lacks breathability

  • Medical-grade film: highly breathable and waterproof, used in premium products

  • Bio-based materials: eco-friendly and gentle, for sustainability-focused brands

No single material does it all. A well-designed patch uses different materials in different zones—for example, more elasticity around the nose wings and stronger adhesion along the bridge.

2. Adhesive: The Make-or-Break Element

Adhesive determines how well the patch sticks, how long it stays, and how it feels to remove.

Key considerations:

  • Medical-grade adhesive: hypoallergenic and safe for sensitive skin

  • Zoned coating: stronger at the edges, lighter in the center—secure hold with gentle removal

  • Residue-free: leaves nothing behind

Different facial areas require different adhesives. Oily zones need stronger hold; delicate areas like the under-eye need gentler formulas.

3. Functional Layer: From Coverage to Active Care

Today’s patches go beyond physical coverage—they deliver active ingredients.

  • Salicylic acid or azelaic acid: for acne-fighting pimple patches

  • Hyaluronic acid: for hydration in eye patches

  • Microneedle arrays: for enhanced absorption in anti-aging patches

  • Natural essential oils: for calming or sleep-supporting effects

The functional layer must work in sync with the backing and adhesive to ensure ingredients are delivered effectively without causing irritation.

4. Structural Design: The Engineering Behind the Patch

A patch is a multi-layer system. How these layers interact matters.

  • Layer integration: top layer for aesthetics, middle for active ingredients, bottom for adhesion

  • Zoned functionality: different areas of the patch serve different purposes

  • Easy application: release liner design should allow one-handed use

Structural design is not about stacking materials—it’s about engineering them to work together for a specific use case and wear time.

Why It All Comes Down to Material Strategy

User Experience

A patch that stings, falls off, or leaves residue will lose customers. First impressions matter, and they are shaped by material choices.

Competitive Moat

Single materials are easy to copy. A well-engineered material system is not. It becomes a technical advantage that competitors cannot easily replicate.

Brand Identity

Material choices communicate who you are. Eco-friendly materials signal sustainability. Medical-grade components signal safety. Premium materials signal quality.

Cost & Positioning

Material combinations directly impact cost and pricing. Smart material strategy allows you to deliver quality at the right price point for your target audience.

Final Thought

Behind every great facial patch is a thoughtful material combination. It’s what makes the product safe, effective, and a pleasure to use.

For brands, the right material partner isn’t just a manufacturer—it’s someone who understands how to make different materials work together. Because in this category, what users can’t see determines what they feel.

● Main applications: Help relieve chronic sinus congestion,Reduce nasal blockage at night,Improve air passage for sensitive noses,Promote better airflow for children and adults
● Core specifications: non‑woven/PE + flexible internal support “spring‑like” structure, disposable single-use design.

   
Description:
HLK Better-Breath Waterproof Nasal Strips are ideal for improving sleep quality by promoting nasal breathing and reducing snoring. The dual spring-frame gently expands the nasal passages, lowering airflow resistance and allowing for deeper, more restorative breathing during the night. Made from medical-grade hypoallergenic materials, the strips are safe and comfortable for sensitive skin. Waterproof and sweat-resistant, they maintain stable adhesion throughout sleep, even in humid conditions. Drug-free and non-invasive, they help alleviate nasal congestion caused by allergies, colds, or sinus pressure. The 66×19 mm large size ensures a comfortable fit for adult noses with higher or broader bridges. OEM/ODM customization enables personalized branding, packaging, strip size, and adhesive strength for home use or commercial applications.

  
Applications:
● Pre-training warm-up to strengthen inspiratory muscles
● Resistance breathing exercises to boost lung capacity
● Daily deep breathing to increase lung capacity

Certificado bajo ISO13485, ISO9001, CE y TGA, HLK Tape cuenta con más de 20 años de experiencia en la fabricación de cintas adhesivas en su fábrica automatizada de 5,000 m², ofreciendo una solución integral desde la idea hasta la entrega.

  • Ventaja del Producto: Nuestras cintas para boca y nariz utilizan adhesivo médico, hipoalergénico y materiales ecológicos; además, puedes personalizar el color, la forma, el sabor y el empaquetado para una comodidad respirable y un agarre duradero.
  • Beneficio del Servicio: Aceptamos pedidos mínimos bajos (tan pocos como 10 piezas), proporcionamos muestras gratuitas (usted cubre el envío), le asignamos un gerente de proyecto dedicado y respondemos a las consultas en un promedio de dos días.
  • Ventaja Técnica: Líneas completamente automatizadas para recubrimiento, enrollado, corte y empaque, junto con monitoreo en tiempo real del grosor y la adherencia, aseguran que cada lote sea consistente.
  • Beneficio de Precio: Gracias a la producción automatizada a gran escala, nuestra cinta cuesta solo $0.03–$0.06 por unidad mientras sigue cumpliendo con la calidad de primer nivel y certificaciones internacionales.
